place_address: 462, Senapati Bapat Marg, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India
text:
Phoenix Palladium: The Definitive Epicenter of Mumbai’s Haute Couture
Phoenix Palladium stands as the unrivaled crown jewel of Mumbai’s luxury landscape, a sprawling architectural masterpiece in Lower Parel that has redefined the "High Street" experience for the Indian subcontinent. Far beyond a mere retail destination, Palladium is a sophisticated ecosystem where global heritage meets contemporary opulence, housed within a structure that seamlessly blends high-gloss marble finishes with soaring, sun-drenched atriums. The mall’s curated portfolio reads like a directory of the world’s most prestigious fashion houses, featuring flagship boutiques from Gucci, Prada, Saint Laurent, and Bottega Veneta, alongside an elite selection of artisanal Indian designers. The "smart" allure of Palladium lies in its multi sensory environment the subtle, signature scent that wafts through the halls, the meticulously choreographed window displays, and the seamless transition from high-fashion galleries to the gourmet enclave of The Palladium Sunset Terrace.It functions as a cultural hub for the city’s elite, where fine dining icons like Ishaara and Foo provide a culinary backdrop to the city’s most exclusive social sightings.With its direct integration into the wider Phoenix Mills precinct, the mall offers a frictionless luxury journey supported by premium concierge services and private valet wings. For the discerning global traveler,Phoenix Palladium is not just a shopping mall; it is a shimmering,climate-controlled testament to Mumbai’s status as a global fashion capital, offering an atmosphere of unhurried elegance amidst the city’s relentless energy.

text:
Phoenix Palladium is undoubtedly one of India’s most premium luxury shopping destinations — a place where world-class brands, fine dining, and exceptional ambience come together seamlessly.
Every visit feels like a refined experience, whether you're here for shopping, food, or simply exploring.

🛍️ Luxury & Brand Experience

From global luxury houses to iconic lifestyle brands, this mall offers an unmatched selection.
I especially enjoyed exploring the high-end watch boutiques, and I’ve uploaded detailed photos of different brand stores — perfect for watch lovers who want to compare collections before visiting.
The display, service, and presentation in these stores truly reflect international standards.

🏬 Ambience & Interiors

The mall is beautifully designed with spacious corridors, elegant décor, and great lighting.
It feels premium yet comfortable, making it ideal for families, couples, and professionals looking for a relaxed but upscale environment.

🍽️ Dining Options

You’ll find everything from luxury fine-dining restaurants to quick bites.
Whether you want coffee, dessert, or a multi-cuisine meal, the choices are excellent and consistently maintain quality.

🚗 Parking & Accessibility

Parking is well organized, and valet service is available.
The mall is fully accessible, with lifts, ramps, and clear navigation — convenient for all visitors.

🧹 Cleanliness & Management

Hygiene and maintenance are top-tier.
Restrooms, walkways, and seating areas are kept clean throughout the day.
Security presence is strong, ensuring a safe and comfortable shopping experience.

⭐ Overall Experience

A perfect destination for luxury shopping, special occasions, and spending quality time.
Whether you're coming for branded fashion, premium watches, or a fine dining experience, Phoenix Palladium consistently delivers excellence.

Highly recommended for shoppers, professionals, tourists, and anyone who appreciates a world-class mall experience.

text:
Phoenix Palladium in Lower Parel, Mumbai, is highly regarded as one of India's premier luxury shopping destinations.
Here are some of the most common positive highlights
Luxury & Brand Variety: It is famously known as "India's First Luxury Mall."   the massive collection of high-end international brands like Gucci, Burberry, Bottega Veneta, and Jimmy Choo, alongside popular "attainable" brands like Zara, H&M, and Uniqlo.

​Dining & Entertainment: The mall is loved for its vibrant food court and premium restaurants. Entertainment options, including the PVR Cinemas and the Timezone gaming arcade, are major draws for families and weekend crowds.
​Vibe & Ambience: It has a  "sophisticated and vibrant" atmosphere. It’s noted for being well-maintained and safe, with a lively crowd even late into the evening.
Convenience Services: As a  shoppers do appreciate the premium amenities such as valet parking, personal shoppers, and "Shop & Drop" services, where the mall stores your bags while you continue exploring.

place_address: 462, Senapati Bapat Marg, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India
text:
Phoenix Palladium Mall is a luxurious destination where your wallet may feel the pinch, but your heart will be delighted. It offers a high-end shopping experience with with a diverse mix of domestic and international brands, including Zara, H&M, Sephora, Uniqlo, Mango, Gucci, Forever 21, Marks & Spencer, Biba, Max, and Reliance Trends. The vibrant food court is ideal for dining like royalty after a lavish shopping spree.It offers more than 100 dining outlets serving global and local cuisines, with notable eateries like Starbucks, KFC, Pizza Hut, Punjab Grill, The Irish House, Burger King, and Auntie Anne’s. Entertainment options include a PVR multiplex with 14 screens, featuring Gold Class, 4DX, and ECX formats, and Snow World, an indoor snow park with snow slides, ice-skating, and a snow dance area..
Even if you're on a budget, the air-conditioned ambiance and lively vibes are free. It's a perfect spot for dates, selfies, and escaping the Mumbai heat.

The mall is otherwise a nice place for shopping and hanging out with friends or family.

text:
Phoenix Palladium: The Definitive Epicenter of Mumbai’s Haute Couture
Phoenix Palladium stands as the unrivaled crown jewel of Mumbai’s luxury landscape, a sprawling architectural masterpiece in Lower Parel that has redefined the "High Street" experience for the Indian subcontinent. Far beyond a mere retail destination, Palladium is a sophisticated ecosystem where global heritage meets contemporary opulence, housed within a structure that seamlessly blends high-gloss marble finishes with soaring, sun-drenched atriums. The mall’s curated portfolio reads like a directory of the world’s most prestigious fashion houses, featuring flagship boutiques from Gucci, Prada, Saint Laurent, and Bottega Veneta, alongside an elite selection of artisanal Indian designers. The "smart" allure of Palladium lies in its multi sensory environment the subtle, signature scent that wafts through the halls, the meticulously choreographed window displays, and the seamless transition from high-fashion galleries to the gourmet enclave of The Palladium Sunset Terrace.It functions as a cultural hub for the city’s elite, where fine dining icons like Ishaara and Foo provide a culinary backdrop to the city’s most exclusive social sightings.With its direct integration into the wider Phoenix Mills precinct, the mall offers a frictionless luxury journey supported by premium concierge services and private valet wings. For the discerning global traveler,Phoenix Palladium is not just a shopping mall; it is a shimmering,climate-controlled testament to Mumbai’s status as a global fashion capital, offering an atmosphere of unhurried elegance amidst the city’s relentless energy.

Phoenix Palladium in Lower Parel, Mumbai, is highly regarded as one of India's premier luxury shopping destinations.
Here are some of the most common positive highlights
Luxury & Brand Variety: It is famously known as "India's First Luxury Mall."   the massive collection of high-end international brands like Gucci, Burberry, Bottega Veneta, and Jimmy Choo, alongside popular "attainable" brands like Zara, H&M, and Uniqlo.

​Vibe & Ambience: It has a  "sophisticated and vibrant" atmosphere. It’s noted for being well-maintained and safe, with a lively crowd even late into the evening.

text:
Phoenix Palladium is a shopping paradise, a foodie haven, and an entertainment hotspot all rolled into one. This shopping mall in Mumbai's Lower Parel is the pinnacle of luxury fashion, fine dining, and indulgent experiences. It is one of India's largest shopping malls, with a gross floor area of 3,300,000 square feet.
This premium luxury shopping mall features a diverse selection of high-end luxury brands, premium restaurants, and a cutting-edge multiplex cinema. They have everything from Hugo Boss to Gucci, Emporio Armani to Paul & Shark, Diesel to Franck Muller, and Bottega Veneta to Jimmy Choo. This mall is a one-stop shop for Mumbai's high-end shoppers looking for luxury fashion brands.
But that's not all Phoenix Palladium has to offer. Throughout the year, the mall hosts a variety of events and exhibitions, making it a popular destination for Mumbai's entertainment enthusiasts.
The top floor of the mall houses a large food court with numerous restaurants and bars serving a wide range of cuisines for foodies to enjoy. The mall also has an internal connection with the adjacent High Street Phoenix Mall, making it even easier for shoppers to visit both malls at the same time.
A multiplex cinema is also part of the complex, where you can watch the latest blockbusters in style and comfort.
In conclusion, the Phoenix Palladium must be on your radar if you want an extravagant shopping experience, delicious food, and entertainment options all under one roof. It's truly a shopper's paradise!

text:
Iur recent visit to Phoenix Palladium Mall, Lower Parel, turned out to be one of the most enjoyable Sundays we’ve had in a long time. The mall was beautifully decorated for Christmas, with sparkling lights, elegant installations, and a festive vibe that instantly lifted the mood. The combination of cheerful décor, lively crowds, and ongoing Black Friday sales created the perfect atmosphere for a relaxed yet exciting day out.

We started our day with a movie at PVR Icon, where we watched Tere Ishq Mein, an intense and captivating film. The premium ambience of the theatre, combined with crystal-clear sound and comfortable seating, made the movie experience outstanding. The film’s emotional depth felt even stronger with the theatre’s immersive environment, making it a great beginning to our mall visit.

After the movie, we headed to Punjab Grill for lunch—and being from North India, this was a comforting and delicious choice. The food was rich in flavour, served warm, and prepared with authentic North Indian taste. The curries, kebabs, and breads reminded us of home, making the meal truly satisfying. The restaurant’s calm atmosphere also gave us the perfect break after the intense movie.

Post lunch, we enjoyed window shopping across the mall. With Black Friday discounts running in multiple stores, the energy was high and the options were endless—fashion, accessories, lifestyle brands, and tech stores all had great deals. Even without shopping much, walking through the vibrant sale displays was fun and refreshing.

Overall, the Mall offered the perfect combination of entertainment, food, and festive ambience. The movie, lunch, Christmas decorations, and sale-filled shopping experience made it a memorable Sunday outing. A mall that truly knows how to create the right vibe!

text:
Phoenix Marketcity Mumbai is located on Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg in Kurla West, Mumbai 400070. It opened in November 2011 and offers approximately 2.1 million square feet of retail space spread across four floors. The mall provides parking for over 2,200 vehicles and operates daily from 11:00 AM to 12:00 AM (midnight).

The mall houses over 600 stores, featuring a wide range of domestic and international brands such as Zara, H&M, Sephora, Uniqlo, Mango, Forever 21, Marks & Spencer, Biba, Max, and Reliance Trends.

Dining options include more than 100 outlets serving global and local cuisines. Some of the notable eateries include Starbucks, KFC, Pizza Hut, Punjab Grill, Jamie’s Pizzeria, The Irish House, Burger King, and Auntie Anne’s.

Entertainment options are diverse. The PVR multiplex has 14 screens, including Gold Class, 4DX, and ECX formats. Snow World offers an indoor snow park experience with snow slides, ice-skating, and a snow dance area, with entry around ₹600. Other attractions include Timezone for arcade games, Amoeba for bowling and bar experiences, Happy Planet for children’s indoor play, Flight 4 Fantasy for flight simulation, and live escape games at Mystery Rooms. Game Palacio is also present in the mall.

Dublin Square, the central event area in the mall, regularly hosts concerts, flea markets, food festivals, and themed events. Past events have included Baby Shark Live, Pokémon-themed fairs, and performances by well-known artists.

The mall is accessible by train via Kurla or Vidyavihar stations, both on Mumbai’s Central and Harbour lines. It is also close to Ghatkopar Metro Station on Line 1, about one kilometer away. Buses and private cars can reach the mall easily via the Santacruz–Chembur Link Road, and ample parking is available.

For a comfortable visit, it is recommended to go during weekday mornings or early afternoons to avoid heavy crowds. Checking the mall's website or social media pages can help you stay informed about upcoming events. Since the mall is large, wearing comfortable footwear is advisable.

text:
The mall services are truly up to the mark, especially the management helpline. Yesterday around 9:30-9:45 PM, due to the CM’s visit at the St. Regis Hotel, there was heavy traffic congestion in the mall parking area and several people were stranded for nearly 30 minutes. I called the mall management helpline mainly to inform them of the issue, with no real expectation of immediate action. However, the response was extremely impressive. The person on the call responded calmly, clearly acknowledged the situation, and confidently assured that quick action would be taken. True to his word, the team called back within 5 minutes, coordinated with staff on ground, and promised to clear the traffic within 10–15 minutes.
Most importantly, the assurance given on the call was actually delivered. The traffic was managed and cleared within the promised time. Such accountability, clear communication, and effective execution are rare and truly commendable. Hats off to the mall management for an exceptionally responsive system.

place_address: Phoenix Mall, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India
text:
It’s always a pleasure to stay at the Courtyard by Marriott Mumbai International Airport. The warm hospitality and outstanding service make it feel like a true home away from home every time we visit Mumbai.
The staff are genuinely caring and always available to help. A special shout-out to Tanuj at the front desk reception – he went above and beyond to ensure our booking was extended to 8 PM on January 30-31 to perfectly align with our late-night flight back to Australia. He first mentioned this during a casual conversation at checkout on January 11, followed up proactively, and confirmed everything was sorted when we returned on the 30th. His thoughtfulness and follow-through made our stay stress-free.
I also want to highlight the excellent lobby team who greet us warmly and handle our large bags from international travel effortlessly. They lift, scan, and take care of everything without us having to lift a finger, while keeping the lobby clear and convenient for everyone to board cars or taxis. It’s such a thoughtful touch that makes arrivals and departures so smooth.
In particular, I’ve met Mr. Sachin Jadhav on several trips – he’s always kind, professional, and takes great care of luggage handling, loading, and unloading. I may not remember every staff member’s name from day and night shifts, but I truly appreciate their collective efforts and dedication.
Thank you to the entire team for consistently delivering such high-quality service. We will definitely continue to be loyal guests every time we’re in Mumbai!

place_address: Phoenix Mall, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India
text:
We stayed at the Courtyard Marriott in Mumbai in December and again in January during our trip to India, and both times it was excellent. The location is so convenient — around 10 minutes from the airport — which made everything really easy.
The service was genuinely outstanding. Every member of staff was attentive and helpful, and the attention to detail was exceptional. I’ve stayed in many great hotels around the world, but the level of care here really stood out.
The rooms were clean, spacious and airy, and housekeeping was consistent throughout our stay. Breakfast was also very good with plenty of choice.
We’ll definitely be staying here again when we return in October.

Special thanks to TEJAS in catering TANUJ AND ALL THE STAFF AT THE MARRIOTT.

place_address: Phoenix Mall, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India

Overall, it was a fantastic stay thanks to the wonderful team. I’d definitely recommend this hotel!

place_address: Phoenix Mall, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India
text:
I stayed at Courtyard Marriott Mumbai on November 19 to celebrate my birthday. I traveled all the way from the USA to India for this special occasion. Before arriving, I called the hotel in advance to arrange birthday room decoration. My husband also called several times before our arrival to make sure the room would be ready.

However, when we checked in, there was no decoration in the room. We called the front desk, and they apologized and said they had forgotten, but promised that the room would be decorated by 4:00 PM. They told us it would be ready when we returned.

We went out for dinner and came back late at night, expecting a surprise, but nothing had been done. The room was still not decorated. This was very disappointing and ruined our special day.

The next day, during checkout, we informed the manager about this issue. The only response we received was “sorry,” with no proper solution or compensation.

We expected better service from a brand like Marriott, especially for a pre-arranged special request. Unfortunately, this experience did not meet our expectations.

place_address: Phoenix Mall, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India
text: As a titanium Marriott Bonvoy member, the service I got from this hotel was extraordinary. Guest relations Ambassador, Tanuj Rutu, front desk Managers, Tanmay Pillai and Apurba went above and beyond to make my stay with family wonderful. Tanuj even arranged complimentary transport from the airport to the hotel as I had large pieces of luggage, he did not hesitate even once to go the extra step to make it happen. Check-in was quick and seamless - they even upgraded our room to an apartment suite even though we were only staying for one night - was not needed but truly made us feel so valued and made our stay even more comfortable after a really long travel journey already. Tanuj made sure on a regular basis if I needed anything, he even arranged for me to check out late - normally late check out is around 4 PM but he let my family stay until around 7 PM, which was very helpful. Next time I am in Mumbai, we are definitely staying at this Marriott -the staff goes all the way, breakfast is excellent, the lounge is incredible (they even made special tea for us). What else can you truly ask for? Overall, a wonderful experience! Highly recommend to anyone.

place_address: Phoenix Mall, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India
text:
Despite already seeing mixed reviews, I decided to give this hotel a chance based on the good ones — big mistake.

We were given Room 615 with a terrible view and a faulty AC that barely worked despite multiple follow-ups and an engineer visit. Cooling issues continued through the night. The mattress was uneven and uncomfortable, and the shower leaked, flooding the washroom.

Hygiene was shocking. A worm was found in a cake during lunch, and the next day there were flies on the food at breakfast. For such serious issues, management only offered apologies. The all-meals package was misleading, with almost the same food and desserts repeated every meal. Service at Momo Café was painfully slow and clearly understaffed — even getting water refilled took over an hour.

Overall, poor maintenance, poor hygiene, and poor service. Not worth the money and definitely not recommended.

text:
I recently stayed at Courtyard by Marriott, Mumbai for three nights, and overall it was an excellent experience.

A special shout-out to Tanuj at the front desk — his professionalism, friendliness, and willingness to assist made a positive difference throughout my stay. He was consistently helpful and attentive, which really enhanced the overall experience.
The room was spacious, clean, and well-appointed with everything I needed for a comfortable stay. Housekeeping maintained the room to a high standard every day. The hotel amenities were impressive — the gym was well equipped and clean, and the pool area was relaxing and well kept.
I also appreciated the overall ambiance of the property — modern, well-maintained, and thoughtfully designed. The team throughout the hotel was professional and approachable, making each interaction pleasant.
Overall, I would highly recommend Courtyard by Marriott, Mumbai for both business and leisure travelers. The service quality, cleanliness, and amenities were all excellent, and I would happily stay here again.

place_address: Phoenix Mall, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India
text:
I recently stayed at the Courtyard Marriott and unfortunately the experience was well below expectations for the price paid.
1.	Dated & Poorly Maintained Rooms
The overall property feels old and in need of a serious refresh. Furniture was worn and peeling, the bathroom grout had visible mold, and the appliances felt outdated. It didn’t match the quality or standard the brand promises.
2.	Customer Service Experience Needs Work
I’ve never stayed at a hotel where calling reception feels like calling a call centre. Each time I phoned, I was placed in a queue/on hold. I had to call three separate times before I could get through just to make a simple request.
3.	Requests Were Ignored
As a Bonvoy member, I was promised a dedicated WhatsApp contact for anything I needed during my stay. It wasn’t responsive or helpful. I requested a sanitary pad — a basic amenity — which never arrived despite following up. When I called reception again, I was put back on hold and eventually gave up.

Overall, the stay was disappointing and felt far from worth the price. Service, maintenance, and guest responsiveness really need attention. I wouldn’t recommend this property based on my experience.

place_address: Phoenix Mall, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India
text:
After my long and memorable stay in Hyderabad, I had earlier shared my appreciation for the exceptional hospitality and customer service I experienced at Marriott Hyderabad. That stay truly reflected what the Marriott brand stands for and set very high expectations for the rest of my India trip.

I concluded my journey with a short stay in Mumbai before my early morning 7 a.m. flight to Istanbul. The plan was simple. Explore a bit of Mumbai, get some rest, and head to the airport smoothly.

Unfortunately, my experience at Marriott Mumbai was disappointing and did not match the standard I had just experienced in Hyderabad.

Right from check-in, the room was not up to expectations. The shower was leaking water in all directions, making the bathroom messy and uncomfortable. After landing in Mumbai, we freshened up quickly and went out for a city tour. By the time we returned, we were completely exhausted and ordered dinner. The food arrived very late, and while I understand minimal service, it came without silverware, adding to the overall disorganized feel.

The biggest concern, however, was the airport drop. I had clearly specified the pickup time, the early morning schedule, and the type of vehicle required due to luggage. Despite confirming everything the previous day, none of the instructions were followed. At 4 a.m., a four-seater vehicle arrived instead of the requested six-seater, and there was an attempt to force all the luggage into it. Only after raising a complaint was a bigger car arranged, which caused an unnecessary delay of around 15 minutes.

Additionally, the wake-up call, coordination, and checkout process were not well organized, especially considering an international early morning flight.

What stood out most was the inconsistency. The level of service, attention to detail, and overall experience at Marriott Hyderabad was far richer and far superior compared to what I experienced in Mumbai. For a global brand like Marriott, consistency across properties is crucial, and this gap was very evident.

I hope this feedback is taken constructively, as Marriott has proven in Hyderabad that world-class hospitality is absolutely achievable.

@Marriott @MarriottBonvoy
#Marriott #MarriottBonvoy #Mumbai #Hyderabad #HotelExperience #CustomerExperience #BrandConsistency #Hospitality #TravelFeedback #IndiaTravel

An Unforgettable Experience of True Luxury and Flawless Service.
Courtyard by Marriott is the epitome of 5-star luxury. My stay was for a family tour, but it felt like a lavish retreat. The architectural elegance of the lobby sets a grand tone for what's to come.

My suite was a sanctuary of comfort and technology. The king-sized bed with high-thread-count linens ensured a perfect night's sleep, and the marble bathroom with its rainfall shower and premium toiletries was a highlight. The dining was prompt, and the quality of the food was exceptional,

The facilities are world-class. The rooftop infinity pool offers unparalleled views of the city skyline, and the gym is equipped with the latest Technogym machines.

What truly sets this hotel apart, however, is the proactive and intuitive service. The staff anticipates your needs before you even have to ask. For anyone seeking a truly luxurious and seamless experience in Mumbai (andheri East), look no further. Highly recommended.

place_address: Phoenix Mall, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India
text:
I am writing to formally express my deep dissatisfaction and shock at the pathetic and unprofessional experience my family and I faced at **Courtyard Marriott Mumbai Airport** during our recent stay.

Our stay was booked **well in advance**, yet on arrival at **2:20 PM**, we were informed that our room was “not ready” and were repeatedly told to wait **“just 10 minutes.”** This false assurance continued for **over an hour**, with absolutely no transparency or accountability from the front desk staff.

What made the situation worse was the fact that **three weddings were being hosted simultaneously**, which was clearly known to the hotel beforehand. Despite this, the hotel failed miserably at basic room allocation and guest handling. Poor planning on your end should not translate into inconvenience for paying guests.

After one hour of waiting, our food arrived, yet we still had no room. We were then offered a **“temporary room”** merely to eat our meal. Even after finishing our food and waiting for **another hour**, our actual room was still not ready.

When we finally decided to leave due to sheer frustration, we received a call claiming that our room was ready. This turned out to be a **complete lie**. Once my mother went down, the staff casually informed her that it would take **another 30 minutes**. This level of dishonesty and mismanagement is absolutely unacceptable for a brand like Marriott.

This entire experience was **stressful, humiliating, and exhausting**, and it completely ruined our plans. The lack of coordination, repeated false promises, and indifferent attitude of the staff reflect extremely poorly on your hotel’s standards.

I expect a **serious explanation, a formal apology, and appropriate compensation** for the inconvenience and mental harassment caused. This is not the experience one expects from an international hospitality brand, and I am extremely disappointed.

If this matter is not addressed promptly and satisfactorily, I will be compelled to escalate it further and share this experience publicly.

Awaiting your immediate response.

Sincerely,
Shagun

place_address: Phoenix Mall, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013, India
text:
Our recent stay 19th & 20th October 2025 at the Courtyard by Marriott Mumbai International Airport was a truly exceptional experience, made possible by the incredible team and their genuine commitment to service. We booked a weekend staycation package, and it turned out to be one of the best decisions we’ve made.

​The high standard of hospitality was evident from the moment we checked in, where the staff instantly put us at ease by generously offering to extend our check-out until 6:00 p.m. the next day. This gesture immediately set a relaxing tone for the entire weekend.

​Truly Personalized Service

​What made our visit truly magical was the way the staff handled my wife’s birthday celebration. I had requested a small surprise, and they went above and beyond to make it special. We were treated to complementary room decoration and a delicious birthday cake. The effort and attention to detail were heartwarming, and I can confirm: my wife was very happy! This personalized touch showcased the true delight we felt with the hospitality of the Marriott staff. In particular, staff members like Tanuj, Umesh, Yash, Shreejith, Ashitosh, and Keual were all truly fantastic and provided exemplary world-class service.

​World-Class Dining and Amenities

​The culinary offerings were equally impressive. The food was amazing, featuring a never-ending variety at every meal that catered to all tastes and preferences. For a relaxing end to the day, we particularly relished the unlimited cocktail options in the Executive Lounge in the evening. It was a perfect, luxurious addition to our package.

​In summary, the seamless blend of comfort, convenience, and profoundly thoughtful service makes this hotel stand out. If you are planning a staycation or need a convenient and luxurious base near the airport, the Courtyard by Marriott Mumbai International Airport should be your first choice. We were delighted and can't wait to return.

Thanks & Regards,

Mitesh Potnis. 🪔

text:
Review for Courtyard by Marriott, Mumbai

I had the great pleasure of staying at Courtyard by Marriott during my journey to the UK, and I must say, it was a truly delightful experience. I'm extremely thankful to all the staff members for their warm hospitality and courteous service.

The property itself is stunning — beautifully maintained with a lovely ambience that instantly makes you feel at ease. The food was absolutely top-notch. The morning breakfast spread was a true highlight, offering an incredible variety: from Chinese delicacies to Gujarati, South Indian, and Maharashtrian items. The sabudana khichdi and vada pav, Mumbai’s iconic snack, were simply outstanding.

The evening lounge experience was equally wonderful, offering an elegant setting with cocktails, mocktails, and a diverse menu that catered to all palates.

Special thanks to Mr. Avinash Chandola, Miss Ankita, Mr. Devish, and Mr. Asif for their kind assistance and warm service throughout my stay. Their attention to detail and guest comfort made the experience even more memorable.

I would highly recommend visiting this Courtyard by Marriott property at least once — it truly offers an exceptional stay in the heart of Mumbai.

text:
We recently stayed at Courtyard Marriott, Andheri for a two-day business trip, and the experience was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed with warm smiles and prompt service. The valet team and luggage assistance were quick and efficient, ensuring a smooth check-in experience.

Special mention to the amazing team at MoMo Café – Aarti, Sushant, and Anish – who made every dining experience memorable with their attentiveness and genuine hospitality. The food was absolutely delicious, and the team went the extra mile to ensure we felt comfortable and cared for. We were lucky to be there during Courtyard Marriott’s 15th anniversary celebrations, and the thoughtful gesture of a complimentary dessert spread delivered to our room made the stay even more delightful.

However, the absolute highlight of our stay was Sachin Gamre from the housekeeping team. We needed some support with housekeeping, and Sachin stepped in with the kind of dedication and warmth that’s rare to find. He not only ensured everything was promptly taken care of but also followed up the next day to check if we were comfortable. Noticing an opportunity to enhance our experience, he even suggested and facilitated a room change for a better view. He helped us move our belongings personally and ensured every little detail was perfect.

His commitment to guest comfort and his willingness to go above and beyond truly set him apart. Kudos also to Mayuresh Gade, the Floor Housekeeping Manager, for his support and seamless coordination.

Sachin Gamre embodies the spirit of genuine hospitality – attentive, proactive, and thoughtful. It’s rare to come across someone who takes such pride in their work and is so committed to ensuring guests have the best possible experience.

Thank you, Courtyard Marriott, for a stay that was not just comfortable but truly heartwarming. We look forward to returning soon!

place_address: 98, municipal industrial estate 3rd floor, Dainik Shivner Marg, Gandhi Nagar, Upper Worli, Worli, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400018, India
text:
Extremely Disappointed with My Experience at the Gopi Vaid Kala Ghoda Store

I visited the Gopi Vaid Kala Ghoda store on 27th September and selected an outfit I really liked. I paid an advance and was told I’d receive it by 20th October after alterations. Later, I requested to receive it earlier, by 17th October, for a Diwali event. The store manager assured me it would be ready on time.
In the week leading up to delivery, I repeatedly tried to confirm my fitting and pickup time, but my calls and messages went unanswered. When I finally got through, I was informed, without any prior notice, that the delivery date had changed. Multiple calls were disconnected, and communication was extremely poor throughout the process.
On the day of delivery, I was told to send my driver to the brand’s Worli workshop, where he was made to wait outside for over an hour before receiving the outfit. The staff member there refused to communicate properly or provide a receipt, and the store manager offered no support when contacted.
When the outfit finally arrived, it was packed in a plastic bag, completely crumpled, and unfinished, with loose threads and poor finishing. I was told it would be picked up again for corrections, but even after full payment, I still did not receive the completed outfit by the promised date.
This was a very disappointing and stressful experience, especially given the brand’s reputation. I hope the management takes this feedback seriously and improves communication and customer service at both the Kala Ghoda store and the Worli workshop.

After all this on 27th October! I still don’t have my outfit and was called saying there’s some emergency with the driver so can we we fast !

place_address: 110, Hill Rd, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050, India
text: It's not a Mall anymore only Globus PVR. The closest place in Bandra for movies. But really a renovated old theatre that was originally famously known as New Talkies. So I am taking you down history lane. I and a friend bunked college to watch movies here every week in 1988-1990, and occasionally later too. It was famous for playing new movies every week at prices that were the lowest. 5-7 rupee stall tickets and 15 rupees balcony. Movies that didn't play elsewhere like the entire Jackie Chan series could be found here. I even watched Predator here. So it has memories. PVR has renovated it to a modern screen. Parking is limited inside but the Valet is helpful in taking care of that issue. So enjoy the movies without going to far.

text:
Globus Mall is a cozy spot for a laid-back shopping experience. It’s not the biggest or flashiest mall, but that’s part of its charm. The atmosphere is bright and inviting, making it a nice place to wander around for a few hours.

When it comes to shopping, Globus Mall has a decent mix of stores, mainly focusing on fashion and lifestyle products. You might not find all the big brand names here, but there are plenty of trendy and affordable options, especially if you’re looking to update your wardrobe without spending too much.

The food court is on the smaller side but has a good variety of options, perfect for grabbing a quick bite in between shopping. Whether you’re in the mood for some fast food or something a bit more substantial, you’ll find something to satisfy your hunger.

Overall, Globus Mall offers a more relaxed and casual shopping experience. It’s not the place for an all-day shopping spree, but it’s great for a quick trip or a casual outing. If you’re in the area and want to shop in a comfortable, less crowded environment, Globus Mall is worth a visit.

text:
Popley & Sons Jewellers is a renowned, family-run business in Mumbai, established in 1927, specializing in fine diamond and gold jewelry. With a rich history spanning over 98 years, they offer exquisite pieces, including engagement rings and custom bespoke creations.

*Locations:*

- *Bandra West*: Popley Eternal is located on Turner Road and Gurunanak Road, near Time Avenue Showroom.
- *Opera House*: Kewalram Ghanshamdas Popley & Sons Jewellers is situated in Panchratna Building, near Roxy Theatre.

*Services and Features:*

- *Diamond Selection*: Popley Eternal offers a wide range of diamond jewelry, including diamond-studded engagement rings and other fine pieces.
- *Assured Exchange Value*: They provide an assured exchange value for their jewelry, giving customers flexibility.
- *Custom Bespoke Creations*: Popley & Sons Jewellers offers custom bespoke jewelry creation services, allowing customers to design their own unique pieces.
- *Same Day Delivery*: Both Popley Eternal and Kewalram Ghanshamdas Popley & Sons Jewellers offer same-day delivery services.
- *Parking and Pet-Friendly*: Popley Eternal has parking available and is pet-friendly.

*Collections:*

While specific collections like "Timeless Spark" and "Eternal Rivalto" aren't detailed in the search results, Popley & Sons Jewellers is known for its high-quality diamond and gold jewelry pieces

text:
Kohinoor Square truly stands out as one of Dadar’s most impressive landmarks, a perfect blend of modern architecture, thoughtful planning, and premium urban convenience. The moment you step in, the scale and sophistication of the space immediately set it apart from anything else in the area. The infrastructure is top-notch, beautifully maintained, and designed with a clear focus on comfort, accessibility, and a high-quality lifestyle.

The layout is spacious, the security is well-managed, and the entire premises feel safe, clean, and professionally run. The commercial section is vibrant and well-organised, offering an upscale mix of restaurants, cafés, and essential services without feeling chaotic. The location is unbeatable, right in the heart of Dadar, making it extremely convenient for both visitors and professionals.

Whether you’re visiting for work, dining, or just exploring, Kohinoor Square delivers a premium experience every single time. It has genuinely elevated the overall look and feel of Dadar and continues to be one of the most iconic additions to Mumbai’s skyline. Highly recommended for anyone wanting a taste of modern Mumbai in one of its most historic neighbourhoods.

text:
Wheelchair Access in Name Only — Insensitive and Humiliating Staff Behaviour

I’m writing this review to expose the huge gap between Kohinoor Square’s claim of being wheelchair-accessible and the reality.

I visited on Saturday, 10 January 2026, with my father, a polio survivor who is permanently mobility-impaired. We had confirmed in advance that wheelchairs are provided. On arrival around 3:30 PM, we were told only two wheelchairs were available — one was faulty. We were forced to use the defective one until a usable wheelchair became available.

We used the wheelchair only inside the mall and returned it around 6:20 PM, after shopping at Westside and eating. Due to Westside’s layout, wheelchair users must exit the store and use common lifts for every floor, which makes movement slow and exhausting.

When we returned the wheelchair, a concierge attendant yelled at me in public, accused us of “hogging” the wheelchair, and said we hadn’t answered calls. Even after I explained my father’s condition, he continued shouting and made a shocking, ableist remark — suggesting my father could have been “seated somewhere for an hour” so someone else could use the wheelchair, saying “what’s the big deal.”

This was humiliating and cruel. A wheelchair is not a convenience — it is an essential mobility aid. Treating a disabled person as someone who can be parked aside shows a complete lack of empathy, training, and basic human dignity. The situation stopped only when another staff member intervened.

If Kohinoor Square cannot ensure wheelchair availability, this must be clearly communicated upfront. More importantly, staff urgently need disability-sensitivity training. Accessibility is not just about buildings — it’s about attitude and respect, both of which were completely missing here.

text:
Kohinoor Square in Dadar, Mumbai:

---

Kohinoor Square in Dadar is an architectural landmark that has truly transformed the skyline of Mumbai. As one of the tallest mixed-use towers in the city, it combines commercial and residential spaces seamlessly, offering both functionality and a sense of luxury.

The exterior design is striking, with its sleek glass and steel facade, reflecting a modern and contemporary style that fits well within the bustling energy of Dadar. Its location is incredibly convenient, situated in the heart of the city with easy access to major transport links like the Dadar railway station and the Western Express Highway, making it an ideal hub for professionals and businesses alike.

Inside, Kohinoor Square is spacious and thoughtfully designed. The commercial floors are well laid out, making navigation easy with clear signage and efficient elevators. The interiors have a sophisticated look, with high ceilings, ample natural light, and elegant decor. The building is equipped with state-of-the-art amenities such as a gym, meeting rooms, and open spaces, which add to its appeal.

Security and safety are clearly prioritized here. There are multiple layers of security, including controlled access and 24/7 surveillance, which creates a sense of safety for everyone who works or visits. The building’s maintenance and cleanliness are also commendable, with staff regularly attending to common areas and ensuring the building stays in pristine condition.

Overall, Kohinoor Square is an impressive and thoughtfully designed building, perfect for businesses seeking a central location with all the modern amenities. It’s a fine example of contemporary architecture in Mumbai and a landmark that contributes to the city’s growth.

---

This review highlights the building’s main features and benefits, giving potential visitors a clear picture of what they can expect. Let me know if you’d like to add more details or customize it further!

Kohinoor mills, now in a new Avatar. Kohinoor Square. A blend of residential, corporate offices, and some good brands for family shopping. Select brands like, Westside, Jockey, Waman Hari Pethe Jewellers, Pantaloons and a couple of more. The complex has good food brands in its premises. With all this you can not forget the recently launched Bastiyan on the 48th floor.

place_address: 33rd Linking Road, opposite KFC, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050, India
text:
The Link Square Mall on Linking Road in Bandra West, Mumbai, was severely damaged in a massive fire that broke out on April 29, 2025. The blaze started in the basement of the three-story commercial complex, specifically in the Croma showroom, around 4:10 am and quickly spread to the upper floors. Here's what we know about the incident:

Fire Severity: The fire was classified as a Level IV (major) fire, prompting a full-scale emergency response from the Mumbai Fire Brigade.

Damage: The mall, which housed over 200 shops and establishments, suffered extensive damage, with large portions completely gutted. A total of 220 shops and two eateries were affected.

Response: Firefighters battled the blaze for over 22 hours, with the fire being finally brought under control by 1:41 am on April 30, 2025. Two firefighters sustained minor injuries during the operation.

Cause: The exact cause of the fire is still under investigation, but it's believed to have been triggered by a short circuit. The mall's internal firefighting system was reportedly not functioning properly.

Investigation: An official inquiry has been launched to determine the cause of the fire and identify measures to prevent similar incidents in the future. The fire brigade chief noted that the mall was filled with combustible materials and had obstructed access, making firefighting extremely challenging.

place_address: 33rd Linking Road, opposite KFC, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050, India
text:
A recent visit to Link Square Mall on Bandra’s Linking Road gave me instant nostalgia—it’s small, purely local, and feels like an extension of street shopping inside walls. Alot of on-trend clothing stores, local designer labels, and bargain outlets fill narrow corridors, creating a friendly urban shopping experience.

The vibe is informal and bustling—certainly not posh, but full of energy. I discovered fashion labels at Hill Road rate points inside air-conditioned spaces. Accessories, jewellery, fabric boutiques, and quirky clothing stores line the floors, making browsing fun and easy to hop between.

Cafés and snack stalls complement the retail scene—quick bites, juices, chaat, coffee. I grabbed a sandwich and chilled at a café corner while watching shoppers hustle past. Seating felt casual and lively, ideal for a quick refuel while browsing.

Though there’s no multiplex, there’s a small arcade zone and improvised entertainment kiosks. Restrooms and elevators are basic but functional. No parking internally; most visitors arrive via local transport or autos—so I hopped off at Bandra station and walked over—just a few minutes.

Link Square is perfect for bargain hunters and casual shoppers looking to explore Hill-Road-style fashion in an organized indoor setting. It’s gritty, local, vibrant—and entirely Mumbai.

text:
A visit to Broadway Shopping Centre, Dadar is like having a classic Mumbai shopping experience. I went here with my family once, and the variety is really huge. From clothes to accessories, everything is available at reasonable prices.

This place is perfect for budget shopping. Bargaining is possible in some shops, so smart buyers can get the best deals. Shopkeepers are generally helpful and suggest products according to your needs.

The ambiance is not like a luxury mall, but the energy of the local market is very lively. The crowd is heavy, especially on weekends, but that is where the real fun of shopping lies. It feels authentic and connected to Mumbai’s culture.

Location is the biggest advantage – it is easily accessible as it is close to Dadar station. This is a great option for quick shopping or festive shopping.

Summary:
Overall, Broadway Shopping Centre is a great place for affordable and practical shopping. If you enjoy local markets and want value for money, this place is definitely worth visiting. 👍🛍️

place_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, Patelwadi.Kurla, Kurla West, Kurla, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400070, India
text:
Phoenix Marketcity is a fantastic spot for a comprehensive shopping and entertainment outing. The mall is immaculately maintained, with bright, modern interiors and a very spacious layout that prevents it from feeling too cramped, even during peak hours.
The retail selection is excellent, featuring a strong mix of high-street brands, anchor department stores, and some premium international labels. Whether you're looking for fashion, electronics, or home decor, you'll likely find it here.
The food and entertainment options are definitely a highlight. The food court is massive, offering almost every cuisine imaginable for a quick bite. Plus, there are several upscale restaurants for a more relaxed dining experience. The cinema multiplex is top-tier and always a good place to catch a film.
My only reason for deducting a star is the weekend crowd. It can get overwhelmingly busy on Saturday and Sunday evenings, making parking and moving around the popular sections a bit of a hassle. Pro-tip: visit during a weekday afternoon for a much calmer experience!
Overall, it's a vibrant, clean, and highly functional mall—a must-visit if you're in the area.

place_address: 5th floor, Dynamix Mall, Parulekar Rd, above Shoppers stop, near Chandan Cinema, Sainath Nagar, MHADA Colony, Juhu, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400049, India
text:
PVR Dynamix Juhu is one of the most popular cinemas in the area and definitely offers a good overall movie experience. The location is very convenient, being inside Dynamix Mall above Shoppers Stop, which makes it easy to access and also provides plenty of options for food or shopping before and after a show. The ambience of the cinema is clean, modern and well maintained, giving a premium feel as soon as you step in. The staff are generally polite and helpful, managing crowds well even during busy showtimes. The washrooms and lobby are also kept tidy, which adds to the comfort of the visit.

The technical quality of the cinema is one of its strongest points. The picture quality is sharp, bright and clear, and the sound system really enhances the experience. Whether it is a Hollywood blockbuster or a Bollywood release, the visuals and audio make the screening immersive. The food and beverage options are also decent, with fresh popcorn, nachos and other standard cinema snacks available. Although the prices are on the higher side, the taste and presentation are satisfactory.

The only real drawback is the seating. While everything else matches a premium standard, the seats are not as comfortable as expected. They feel a little cramped, especially during long movies, and the legroom is limited. In some screens, the distance from the seats to the screen can also feel slightly awkward, making the viewing angle less comfortable if you are seated too close.

Overall, PVR Dynamix Juhu is a great place for a movie outing, with excellent sound, visuals, ambience and service. If the seating comfort improves, it would easily become one of the best cinema experiences in Mumbai. I would rate it 4 out of 5.

The seats were incredibly comfortable, and the staff was friendly and attentive. The concessions offered a wide range of snacks and drinks, and the popcorn was freshly made and delicious!

Overall, all Pvr Theater are must-visit for anyone looking for a premium cinema experience in Mumbai. can't wait to go back and watch another movie at Juhu.

text:
A Memorable Experience at PVR Dynamix, Juhu!

We had a truly delightful and inspiring experience at PVR Dynamix, Juhu, Mumbai on July 8th, 2025, during the grand launch of the movie “The Game of Change.”

The ambience, comfort, and hospitality at the venue were top-class. The sound and screen quality enhanced the impact of the film’s powerful message. It was an evening filled with real-life success stories, transformational journeys, and a collective spirit of purpose-driven change that left everyone deeply moved.

PVR Dynamix served as the perfect setting for such an inspiring and high-energy event. Kudos to the team for maintaining excellent standards in comfort, cleanliness, and service.

Highly recommended for those who appreciate quality cinema experiences, especially for films that aim to elevate awareness and spark meaningful dialogue.

Looking forward to returning for more such empowering events!

text:
I recently visited your store on my two-wheeler, but I was denied entry. I was informed that only cars and four-wheelers are permitted inside, and that valet parking is available exclusively for them within the building. Instead, I was instructed to park my two-wheeler across the road.

Consequently, I decided not to visit the store and returned home.I would like to suggest that, rather than refusing service to customers with two-wheelers, your valet team could offer to take the keys and assist in parking those vehicles outside. This simple gesture would create a much more positive impression and demonstrate that all customers are valued.

Unfortunately, this experience has left a negative impression, and whenever I pass any of your outlets, I am likely to recall this incident. I hope you will consider making your services more inclusive in the future.

Very disappointing experience at this store. I went to buy the Oppo F31 Pro (8GB/128GB) using my Bajaj EMI card. The salesperson asked me to meet the finance person on the first floor. After checking, he said my Bajaj finance was rejected.

I then requested him to check with IDFC finance. He asked me to wait for 15 minutes, but instead of actually checking, he later told me that since Bajaj was rejected, IDFC would also be rejected — without even trying. This felt very unprofessional and misleading.

After wasting my time, I went to Digi1 and bought the same phone on the same day using the same Bajaj EMI card, which clearly shows the issue was with their handling, not my eligibility.

Staff needs better training and honesty. Customers’ time should be respected.

place_address: New Link Rd, Phase D, Shastri Nagar, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400053, India
text: A commercial mall located on New Link Road in Andheri. It is one of the oldest shopping malls in Mumbai. Established in 2002, this mall is designed with an Italian theme and has 3 storeys. This mall has shops selling different types of merchandise. It has a Multiplex Cinema house, office spaces, a sports turf and a parking space. There are restaurants on the ground floor, but lacks a food court. It has has two escalators flanked by a huge staircase. However, this mall has a dull look with no tight security and one can get a musty smell of the old centralized air-conditioner. Had roamed around the mall for a short time as there was nothing much to look around. This mall is an ideal place for families, couples, friends, movie lovers, officegoers as well as shopaholics.

place_address: New Link Rd, Phase D, Shastri Nagar, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400053, India
text:
Citi Mall in Andheri is one of those places that has managed to stay relevant over the years, despite the arrival of newer malls around the city. I would rate it a solid 4 stars for the overall experience. The location is excellent – right on Link Road, making it convenient for both locals and visitors from other parts of Mumbai. Parking is generally manageable, though it can get a little crowded on weekends.

The mall itself has a good mix of options. The PVR cinema here is definitely a highlight – the screens are comfortable, the sound quality is great, and it’s a go-to spot for many in Andheri to catch the latest movies. The food court and restaurants offer decent choices, though it could use a few more updated outlets. One can find both casual dining and quick snacks, making it versatile for families and groups.

In terms of shopping, it isn’t as large as some of the newer malls, but it still has a variety of retail stores that cater to fashion, lifestyle, and daily needs. Maintenance and cleanliness are generally good, though there’s room for improvement. Overall, Citi Mall remains a dependable, centrally located hangout spot in Andheri.

place_address: Shop no. 1, Sai Commercial Complex, Linking Rd, Khar West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400052, India
text:
I recommend the Eco Sattva Store on Linking Road to anyone looking to buy chemical free & organic skincare & haircare skincare products for yourself. The store stocks everything ranging from skincare products - creams, lotions, lip balms, scented soaps, scrubs & much more - ranging from their own products to other brands.  Plus haircare ranging from oils, packs, shampoos, conditioners & much more. The customer service was excellent - the store manager was very gentle, attentive, empathizing, knowledgeable & very proactive in understanding my needs & suggesting products accordingly.

I purchased a Veg Collagen Support Gummies - Carbamide Forte, plus a saffron anti-ageing cream. I am satisfied with using both.

I recommend this store to anyone visiting Mumbai & shopping in Linking Road & wants to buy chemical free products for themselves.

I rate the store 8/10 on product quality & customer service. Thanks, Sarika Tainwala

place_address: G-31, Ground Floor, Link Square Mall, Off Linking Rd, next to Ajmal, Bandra West, W, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050, India
text:
Unicorn Apple Store – A Decade of Outstanding Service

I’ve been a loyal customer of Unicorn, Apple’s Premium Partner, for over a decade—and they’ve never let me down. Just yesterday, I purchased an iMac desktop from their Andheri West, Mumbai store. Their service engineer, Mr. Bipin Badeliya, went above and beyond to set it up at my home.

He seamlessly transferred my data folder from a Windows PC to the new iMac, configured all four of my email accounts, set up Microsoft OneDrive, and installed Microsoft 365. Every step was handled with a professional, customer-first approach that truly deserves recognition.

Now, contrast this with my experience at Apple’s own BKC Store. Despite multiple requests, they flatly refused to assist with transferring data from my Windows PC or setting up my mail, contacts, calendar, and OneDrive—tools I use daily.

So much for Apple’s promise of delivering an “unparalleled customer experience.” In my case, it was Unicorn who delivered on that promise—with empathy, expertise, and genuine customer centricity.

Unicorn, you’ve earned my trust once again. Apple BKC, you’ve got some catching up to do.

#TimCook #AppleBKC #UnicornApple #UnicornStore #iMac #AppleStore #CustomerCentric

place_address: G-31, Ground Floor, Link Square Mall, Off Linking Rd, next to Ajmal, Bandra West, W, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050, India
text:
This is probably one of the first stores and service centres I have visited where I felt unwelcome as a customer. Let me tell you EXACTLY why, in as many details as this box will hold. The service centre is run by a bunch of overly made-up and painfully under-dressed college kids, who immediately judge, snicker and laugh at the customers coming to them with their problems. And they DO NOT make any attempts to hide it. They're thinking, "Why do Apple customers come in to have their products repaired? Why do I need to fill out a report just because someone else's purchases has a fault to be looked into? Why not just dump the old and purchase the latest shiny object displayed on the display pedestals?" I'm sorry, little Gen-Z brat, but if a 2015 Macbook can survive not just for a decade, but also a small fire at the power plug socket, there's no way in hell I am replacing it! I mean, this laptop clearly deserves a more fitting goodbye than that. So, save your eye rolls for when your future landlords come knocking on your door for the rent, right after your parents have kicked you out for over-staying your welcome. And FYI, just because they gave you the title at the Apple Store, it doesn't mean you're a genius!

As if this wasn't enough, later at the store when I went in to purchase a new Magsafe charger, I was left waiting at the help desk for nearly 20 minutes. Apparently, the store assistant had gotten distracted and forgot about me and my query. No apologies, no remorse. Just a cold "your charger isn't available in any this Unicorn Store or anywhere else in the country. I suggest looking in Reliance or Croma."

Safe to say, I will not be visiting this outlet ever again for any future Apple products. Unless I'm feeling overly sadistic and want to be made to feel inferior or like a used rag in a mechanic's garage. Maybe then. Maybe then ...

place_address: G-31, Ground Floor, Link Square Mall, Off Linking Rd, next to Ajmal, Bandra West, W, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050, India
text:
I recently had a frustrating experience at this Unicorn Apple Store that left me questioning their professionalism and consistency.

On the launch day of the iPhone 17, I visited this Unicorn store to trade in my iPhone 13. They quoted me a fair trade-in value, but I wasn't able to transfer my data on the spot. The staff told me to come back the next day after completing the backup — no mention that the quoted price would change.

When I returned the very next day, I was surprised and disappointed to hear that my phone’s trade-in value had dropped by ₹3,000. I explained that I had been told to return the next day, but they simply said, “Prices change daily.” There was no warning about this the day before, and I felt misled. It seemed like I was being penalized for following their advice.

Frustrated, I decided to visit a different Unicorn store (Oberoi Mall) — and to my surprise, they offered me an even higher trade-in value than what I was originally quoted on launch day. The staff there were much more professional, transparent, and customer-friendly.

This inconsistency between Unicorn stores is unacceptable. As a customer, I expect fair treatment and clear communication, especially from a brand representing Apple. The experience at the first store was disappointing and felt opportunistic, while the second store handled things the way it should have been done from the start.

Unicorn really needs to work on standardizing its service and ensuring customers are treated fairly across all locations.

text:
I rarely write reviews, but this experience deserves to be shared. My iPhone 14 Pro Max suddenly developed a white screen issue. Since it was out of warranty, I was honestly dreading the cost of a screen replacement I knew it wouldn’t be cheap.

I took it to Unicorn Apple Care in Andheri West, and what happened next completely blew me away. Not only did they replace the screen with a brand new one, but they also did it absolutely FREE OF CHARGE, despite my phone being OUT OF WARRANTY.

And the best part? I had my phone back with ALL THE DATA and with me in under 24 hours. No delays, no back and forth, just fast, honest, and incredibly generous service. In a time when most service centers are all about squeezing out every rupee, this kind of support felt unheard of.

Their team was professional, transparent, and genuinely helpful. I can’t recommend this store enough. If you have any issues with your Apple device, go here first you might just walk out as amazed and grateful as I did.

text:
Sharing my honest and sincere feedback about Unicorn Andheri West Mumbai store. On 26th Jan 25 at 9:15pm I purchased Iphone 16 pro from the Unicorn store Andheri West Mumbai .
Transferred the data at the store , next day morning on Monday 27th Jan 25, at 9am within 12 hours of purchase of the phone I have noticed that top right of the screen has a noticeable scratch. I rushed to the Unicorn store immediately and met one of their so called sales executive Mr Wankhede. He flatly refused that the store was not responsible for any physical damage after purchase and did not have any empathy or even took time to speak or investigate the matter.  I asked for a senior person to speak to - he said the senior head was not available. I had to leave the store as no one was there to help, the guy whom I purchased the iPhone 16 pro from was doing an afternoon shift that day, and was not available, post that I came back and sent an email to the store manager and Apple support team, on 27th Jan morning, sent a reminder today for someone to hear me out. In great disappointment there has been no revert from Unicorn Store Andheri West. I have received a defective product and this was noticed by the sales person, I have been an Iphone user since 2011, something like has never happened . If the store has given a defective product they should accept their mistake and replace it.

From Apple being a world renowned brand , this is the least expected . Apple promotes
iPhone 16 pro being tough phone , I fail to understand that my phone got a scratch overnight within 12 hours of purchase, the previous iPhone series I have used haven’t ever had these concerns.
It should be the responsibility of the Unicorn sales person to check the physical part of the the iPhone on purchase, we are customers, they should check it throughly as this is part of their jobs through out the day.
Extremely disappointed and still await their response. I would assure you that going forward Apple/Unicorn would loose an extremely loyal customer which am sure does to them.
Fatima

I was then informed that the delivery would be sent through an app rider, for which I had to pay an additional ₹59. Although this was inconvenient, I agreed as a one-time exception.
However, despite clearly giving special instructions for cutting the boneless chicken, I received whole breast pieces instead. This completely disregards customer instructions.
What is even more concerning is that when I raised the issue, Mr. Akash Gadade — who initially handled the order — denied taking the order and claimed someone else did. This felt extremely unprofessional and dishonest, especially when the mistake was clearly on the store’s end.
As a loyal customer, this level of service and accountability is unacceptable.

text:
A Shopper's Paradise: Lifestyle Store at Oberoi Mall
Lifestyle Store, nestled within the vibrant Oberoi Mall, offers a curated shopping experience that caters to diverse tastes and preferences. This multi-brand retail destination brings together a wide range of fashion, beauty, and home products under one roof.
A Fashion Haven
For fashion enthusiasts, Lifestyle offers an extensive collection of apparel, footwear, and accessories for men, women, and children. From trendy casual wear to elegant formal attire, you'll find something to suit every occasion. The store's well-curated selection of international and domestic brands ensures that you stay ahead of the fashion curve.
Beauty and Wellness
The beauty section at Lifestyle is a haven for beauty aficionados. With a wide array of cosmetics, fragrances, and skincare products from renowned brands, you can indulge in self-care and pampering. The knowledgeable staff can help you choose the perfect products to enhance your natural beauty.
Home and Lifestyle
Elevate your living spaces with Lifestyle's home and lifestyle products. From stylish home decor items to functional kitchenware, you'll find everything you need to create a beautiful and comfortable home. The store also offers a range of gifts and accessories for special occasions.
A Seamless Shopping Experience
Lifestyle Store at Oberoi Mall is designed to provide a seamless and enjoyable shopping experience. The spacious layout, well-organized sections, and attentive staff make it easy to navigate and find what you're looking for. The store also offers convenient payment options and efficient customer service.
Whether you're a fashionista, a beauty enthusiast, or a home decor aficionado, Lifestyle Store at Oberoi Mall is the perfect place to indulge your shopping desires.

text:
Oberoi Mall is a popular shopping destination located in Mumbai, India. It is known for housing various lifestyle stores, including fashion, accessories, electronics, home decor, and more.

Lifestyle stores generally offer a wide range of products catering to different aspects of everyday life. Here are some categories commonly found in lifestyle stores:

Fashion: Lifestyle stores often have sections dedicated to clothing, footwear, and accessories for men, women, and children. You can find a variety of apparel items such as dresses, shirts, jeans, ethnic wear, sportswear, shoes, handbags, jewelry, and more.

Beauty and Personal Care: These stores usually have a beauty section with cosmetics, skincare products, hair care items, fragrances, and personal grooming products.

Home and Decor: Lifestyle stores often feature a home section offering a range of items for home decor, kitchenware, bedding, bath accessories, furniture, and other household essentials.

Electronics and Gadgets: Some lifestyle stores may also have a section dedicated to electronics, where you can find mobile phones, laptops, tablets, audio equipment, and other electronic gadgets.

Gifts and Stationery: Many lifestyle stores include a gifting section where you can find a variety of items suitable for different occasions, such as greeting cards, stationery, novelty items, and small gift items.

I visited the lifestyle store in Oberoi two days ago, and I was quite disappointed with how their marketing strategy is implemented nowadays. Although a plaque on a section of clothes advertises a certain discount, there's no clear indication that the offer applies to all the clothes displayed on that particular rack.

It's a poor choice of marketing because I found out at the cash counter that not all the pieces I picked were eligible for the offer. What's more frustrating is that the salespeople who assisted me in choosing the items didn't mention anything about this discrepancy.

place_address: Oberoi Mall, Western Express Hwy, Geetanjali Railway Colony, Ram Nagar, Goregaon East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400063, India
text: The store in itself has a good collection but a pretty bad management. They sell their membership by deceit and do not provide the right information to customers. I was asked to take membership and I repeatedly asked if the birthday month discounts would be applicable to the current bill. Once the bill was generated and I questioned about the same again, I was told it wasn’t their policies for it to be applied in the same bill since my membership isn’t activated. Again this was never told to me. When I asked to cancel the membership, I was told they can’t because the membership is activated. I heard so many contradictory comments. When I asked to see a manager, someone pretended to be one. I had to ask additional questions, and then was revealed that he was infact not the manager. The manager came in and kept explaining how it’s not in their policies and no one does it. Well, it’s on them to provide customers with all the information instead of assuming their policies are known to the entire world. There is no way I’ll know about their policies unless they tell me. In the end, I realized that not only are they wasting my money, they are continuing to waste my time. Please be careful and do not sign up for any membership offered by them!

text: “Powai Plaza is a well-connected commercial hub opposite IIT Powai with a mix of business offices and retail. The building is well-maintained, and I appreciate the clean, hygienic atmosphere and ample parking. place_address: Unit No SF201A, 1st Floor, Infiniti Mall, New Link Rd, Phase D, Shastri Nagar, West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400102, India
text:
If I could I'd give negative stars. The store was in an absolute mess, staff was least bothered in organising the items according to the prices. It's a total trap because as shown in the pictures, the sale says under 499 but if you see the kurtis, it says Buy 2 @ XYZ price, what you wouldn't notice easily is the each at the bottom.
I bought 8 kurtis in total, 6 from the 2 @ 549 shelves and 2 from the 2 @ 449 only from the stack of kurtis all folded up, there was no chance of us picking up something left by other customers. Yet, after 2 hours of trying on the clothes and standing in the queue for the billing, we were not informed that one pair of the 8 kurtis we purchased may not qualify for the discount. As someone who has worked in retail myself, it is common knowledge to let customers know of this even if you assume they know of it. Despite all this, the person at the counter couldn't care less to let us know of the No refund policy and the items not matching the discount offered, he was more busy on selling the membership that gets us offers.
We left the store feeling robbed after knowing there is no way we could get a refund for the items we would have a problem with. What's the point of a shop if the state of the clothes, the store policy and the staff are no different than buying from the vendors at the station.

Infinity Mall, Andheri West – A Compact Gem in Mumbai’s Urban Tapestry

Nestled in the vibrant heart of Andheri West, Infinity Mall may be modest in scale, but it is impressively curated and efficiently designed for today’s discerning urban shopper. Now effortlessly accessible via the newly expanded Mumbai Metro Rail, this shopping destination offers a seamless blend of convenience, luxury, and trend-forward experiences.

From staple lifestyle anchor Westside to contemporary cult favorites like Snitch and beauty innovator Tira, the retail lineup is refreshingly balanced. Looking for premium picks? You’ll find MAC Cosmetics for your beauty fix and Swarovski to add that perfect sparkle.

The jewel in its crown, however, is the PVR ICON — a state-of-the-art cinema that elevates your movie night into a luxury experience with Dolby Atmos sound, plush seating, and premium concessions.

Ideal for a quick yet satisfying retail therapy session, casual dining rendezvous, or an impromptu film outing, Infinity Mall serves as a well-rounded lifestyle hub for locals and metro commuters alike. It’s not just a mall—it’s a microcosm of the city’s evolving taste and tempo.

place_address: New Link Rd, Phase D, Oshiwara, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400053, India
text:
Infinity Mall has a lot going for it—great brands, plenty of dining options, and easy access via metro. The car parking is spacious, and the crowd is decent. But all of this gets overshadowed by the absolute disaster that is the play area.

The play area is a complete scam! It’s packed with claw machines that are nothing but fraud. These machines are rigged so badly that no matter how many times you try, you’ll never win. I watched almost 50 people attempt to win something, and not a single person got a toy. Each try costs anywhere from ₹150 to ₹250, so imagine the money wasted!

Then there’s the ridiculous claw machine for “big prizes” like iPhones, watches, and AirPods. It’s even worse—only gives you 5 seconds to press the claw, which they don’t even mention anywhere. It’s designed to make you fail. This is nothing but blatant cheating, and it’s infuriating.

To make matters worse, the staff are rude and unhelpful. The manager is apparently nonexistent because no one will let you speak to them. If you complain, the staff just ask you to leave instead of addressing the issue. It’s disgusting customer service.

So, if you’re planning to visit Infinity Mall, stick to shopping and dining. Avoid the play area entirely because there’s zero fun to be had there—only frustration and scams.

text:
Infiniti Mall in Andheri West is one of Mumbai’s premier shopping destinations, offering a comprehensive mix of retail, entertainment, and dining options. Situated in a prime location, it caters to a diverse crowd ranging from local residents to tourists seeking a modern shopping experience.

### Ambiance and Layout
The mall features a contemporary design with spacious walkways and well-planned store layouts. Its clean, well-lit environment creates a welcoming atmosphere for shoppers. The decor is stylish yet practical, making navigation easy with clear signage and ample seating areas for rest.

### Shopping Experience
Infiniti Mall houses a wide variety of stores, from high-end brands to more affordable options, making it accessible to different budget ranges. Whether you’re looking for fashion, electronics, home decor, or beauty products, the mall’s extensive range of retailers ensures you’ll find what you need. Popular brands such as Zara, H&M, and Marks & Spencer have a presence here, alongside several local boutiques.

### Entertainment and Leisure
One of the mall's standout features is its entertainment options. The PVR multiplex cinema is a major draw, offering the latest movies in a comfortable and luxurious setting. Additionally, the mall has a well-equipped gaming zone and a fun-filled play area for children, making it a great destination for families.

### Dining Options
Infiniti Mall excels in its variety of dining choices. The food court offers a wide range of cuisines, from fast food chains to regional specialties. For those looking for a more refined dining experience, there are several full-service restaurants and cafes scattered throughout the mall, including popular names like Chili’s, The Irish House, and Mainland China.

### Facilities and Services
The mall provides a host of amenities to enhance the shopping experience. These include clean and well-maintained restrooms, baby care rooms, and wheelchair accessibility. The parking facility is spacious and well-organized, with valet services available. Additionally, the mall offers free Wi-Fi, which is a nice perk for shoppers wanting to stay connected.

### Events and Promotions
Infiniti Mall frequently hosts events and promotions, adding to its vibrant atmosphere. Seasonal sales, fashion shows, and cultural performances are common, providing entertainment and value to visitors. These events often attract large crowds and add an extra layer of excitement to the shopping experience.

### Accessibility
Located in Andheri West, Infiniti Mall is easily accessible via public transport, including buses and the local train network. For those driving in, the mall’s proximity to major roads ensures a convenient commute.

### Conclusion
Infiniti Mall in Andheri West is more than just a shopping center; it’s a lifestyle destination. Its blend of high-quality retail options, diverse dining choices, and extensive entertainment facilities make it a go-to spot for a complete day out. Whether you're shopping, catching a movie, or enjoying a meal, Infiniti Mall offers a well-rounded and satisfying experience for all its visitors.
