Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, Amrut Nagar, Ghatkopar West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400086, India
text:
R City Mall, Ghatkopar West is undoubtedly one of the best shopping and lifestyle destinations on Mumbai’s Central Line. It’s a massive, beautifully designed mall where you can easily spend an entire day without getting bored. The mall is spacious, clean, and very well maintained, with a lively yet comfortable vibe throughout.
The variety of stores is impressive, ranging from popular national and international brands to electronics, jewellery, and everyday essentials. Parking is never a hassle with multiple levels available, along with valet service. The layout is easy to navigate, with wide walkways, clear signage, and elegant interiors that give the mall a luxurious feel.
Food lovers are truly spoiled for choice here. From quick snacks and cafés to full-course meals (both veg and non-veg), the food court and restaurants cater to every taste. Dining options like Banana Leaf offer an authentic traditional experience with warm ambience, generous portions, and courteous service. Though weekends can get crowded, the overall experience remains enjoyable.
Entertainment options are another major highlight. The multiplex cinema is superb, with comfortable seating and ample legroom. Kids absolutely love attractions like Snow World, KidZania, and gaming zones, making it a perfect family destination. The mall frequently introduces new themes and décor, which keeps every visit fresh and exciting.
Customer service across stores is generally friendly and helpful. I personally had a great experience at Origem (lab-grown diamond jewellery), where the staff was polite, knowledgeable, and guided me perfectly while selecting an engagement ring.
Overall, R City Mall delivers a complete shopping, dining, and entertainment experience. Despite weekend crowds, the cleanliness, variety, and vibrant atmosphere make it totally worth the visit. Whether you’re shopping, watching a movie, dining out, or just hanging out with family and friends—this mall truly has it all. Highly recommended! 👍❤️

text:
R City Mall is a popular and well-planned shopping and entertainment destination that offers a complete lifestyle experience for visitors of all age groups. text:
RCT Mall in Mumbai offers a solid shopping and entertainment experience in a convenient and accessible location. The mall has a wide mix of retail stores, ranging from well-known brands to local specialty outlets, giving visitors plenty of options whether they’re looking for fashion, electronics, or everyday essentials. The layout is easy to navigate, with clear signage and spacious walkways that make moving between stores comfortable, even on busier days.

Whether you’re running errands or planning a day out with family or friends, RCT Mall delivers a well-rounded experience.

place_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, Amrut Nagar, Ghatkopar West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400086, India
text: R City Mall in Ghatkopar West, Mumbai, is one of the city’s largest and most vibrant shopping destinations, sprawling across 1.2 million square feet with over 350 stores. Developed by the Runwal Group and opened in 2009, it offers a mix of retail, dining, and entertainment that caters to families, friends, and solo visitors. The mall houses major brands like Shoppers Stop, Croma, and Lifestyle, alongside international names such as Nike, Adidas, and Marks & Spencer. Shoppers can find everything from clothing and electronics to souvenirs, though some reviews note that items can be pricey compared to other malls. The food court and standalone restaurants, including Rajdhani, Punjab Grill, and Hitchki, offer diverse cuisines, but food quality varies, with some visitors praising the variety while others find it average. Entertainment is a standout, with a nine-screen INOX multiplex, India’s first KidZania, a Snow Kingdom, and attractions like the Click Art Museum and Red Carpet Wax Museum. These make it especially appealing for families and kids, though the bowling alley and some gaming zones receive mixed feedback. The mall’s open layout, ample sunlight, and clean restrooms enhance the experience, but it can get crowded, especially on weekends, leading to long waits at restaurants and elevators. Parking is ample but can be slow to navigate, with valet options available for convenience. Accessibility is a plus, with wheelchair-friendly entrances and proximity to Ghatkopar Railway Station and the Jagruti Nagar metro, making it reachable by cab, train, or bus. While some find it comparable to top malls globally, others see it as practical but not exceptional due to high costs and occasional service issues, like a reported poor experience at Starbucks. Overall, R City Mall is a lively, all-in-one destination for shopping, dining, and fun, though planning visits on weekdays may help avoid the rush.

place_address: New Link Rd, Oshiwara, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400102, India
text:
We moved into VICINO by ID Group this office space with high hopes, expecting a professional and well-maintained workspace. Unfortunately, the reality has been nothing short of frustrating. The AC barely works, leaving us in a heatbox on random days. The water supply is unreliable, which is especially frustrating for those of us commuting long distances. To make matters worse, short circuits happen randomly, making the infrastructure feel more like a ticking time bomb than a modern office.
But the biggest letdown? The attitude of the higher management. Instead of addressing concerns, they are rude, dismissive, and completely disrespectful to tenants. It’s shocking how little they care about maintaining a basic standard of service.
Don't be fooled by the Rustomjee tie-up—the reality is far from the polished image they try to sell. If they can’t even respect their existing tenants, imagine how they’ll treat new ones. Think twice before moving in.

We left the store feeling robbed after knowing there is no way we could get a refund for the items we would have a problem with. What's the point of a shop if the state of the clothes, the store policy and the staff are no different than buying from the vendors at the station.

text:
Trustworthy and Professional Staff

Westside has always been amazing in providing variety of clothes across all ages, but this review is especially for their management.

My mom lost her gold and diamond bracelet at the store this afternoon and realised it only late in the evening. After a lot of thinking she guessed she must have dropped while trying out stuff at westside. So I went there hoping I’d get it back. As soon as I entered the store, we checked with the security lady at the entrance and she knew about it and asked me how it looked and figured it’s mine, so she called someone and asked them to take it further. Then after a few verification questions after being convinced they gave it to us.

I truly want to appreciate the honesty and integrity of the entire team. In today’s time, it’s rare to come across such responsible and trustworthy staff. The prompt action, coordination, and professionalism shown by everyone involved was truly commendable.

A big thank you to the security staff and management for going out of their way to ensure we got something so valuable back safely. This experience has really built a lot of trust and respect for your store.

Grateful for your kindness and support 🙏

place_address: Eastern Express Hwy, Samata Nagar, Thane West, Thane, Maharashtra 400606, India
text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Korum Mall – A Vibrant and Complete Shopping & Entertainment Destination
Korum Mall is one of the most popular and lively malls, offering a complete experience of shopping, food, and entertainment all under one roof. It is a perfect destination for families, friends, and individuals looking to spend quality time in a well-maintained and energetic environment.
The mall has an excellent variety of branded and local stores, covering fashion, footwear, electronics, lifestyle, and daily needs. Whether you are window shopping or looking for specific brands, Korum Mall provides plenty of options for every budget and preference. The layout is well-planned, making it easy to move around despite the mall being busy.
Food lovers will especially enjoy Korum Mall. The food court and restaurants offer a wide range of cuisines, from quick bites to full meals. The seating areas are spacious and comfortable, making it a great place to relax and enjoy food with family or friends.
Entertainment is a major highlight here. With a multiplex cinema, gaming zones, and regular events, Korum Mall always has something happening. It is a great place to unwind after a long day or spend a fun weekend.
Cleanliness, safety, and management are well handled. The mall is clean, well-lit, and secure, with helpful staff and smooth crowd management. Despite being one of the busiest malls, it maintains a pleasant and organized atmosphere.
The location of Korum Mall is also very convenient, with easy access via public transport and ample parking facilities, making visits smooth and hassle-free.
Overall, Korum Mall delivers a complete and enjoyable mall experience—lively, modern, and well-managed. It is a go-to place for shopping, entertainment, and dining.
A well-earned 5-star rating ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ for its vibrant ambience, great store mix, excellent food options, and entertainment value. Highly recommended! 🌟🛒🎬

place_address: Eastern Express Hwy, Samata Nagar, Thane West, Thane, Maharashtra 400606, India
text:
Korum Mall is one of the most popular shopping destinations in Thane, known for its great location and easy accessibility from different parts of the city. Situated right on the main road, it’s very convenient to reach whether you’re coming by car, auto, or public transport. The parking space is well-managed, and the entry and exit are quite smooth, which makes the overall experience comfortable right from the start.

The mall has been around for quite some time, and that shows in its structure. Some parts of the building look a bit old and definitely need maintenance. The good part is that the repair and renovation work is already going on, which means the management is actively working to keep the mall in good shape. Once the renovation is complete, it will surely look much better and more modern.

Inside, the mall is spacious and clean, with plenty of shops catering to a wide range of needs—fashion, electronics, food, and entertainment. The lower floors are quite lively, especially around the food court and brand outlets. You’ll find popular stores and some nice options for both shopping and dining. The crowd here is decent, mostly families and youngsters who come to hang out or catch a movie.

However, the upper floors of the mall do feel a bit empty. Some shops seem to have closed down, and there are areas that could use more activity or new outlets to bring back the vibrancy. It doesn’t feel unsafe or unpleasant, just a bit quiet compared to the bustling lower levels. Hopefully, as part of the renovation, the mall management will attract more stores and events to those areas.

The food court is well-organized with a good mix of cuisines—from local snacks to popular fast-food chains. There’s also a multiplex, which is clean and comfortable, adding to the entertainment factor. Overall, Korum Mall still holds its charm as a good weekend spot for shopping, movies, or just spending time with friends and family.

In short, while the mall might feel a bit dated in some corners and empty on the upper floors, it’s still one of the better malls in Thane because of its great location, good facilities, and ongoing improvement work. With the repairs underway, Korum Mall has the potential to look fresh and more appealing in the coming months.

The entertainment options here are a big plus. The theatre provides a comfortable movie experience, and the gaming zone adds an extra layer of fun, especially for families and youngsters. It’s a nice place to spend an entire day without feeling bored.

The food court is another highlight. Despite the mall’s compact size, it offers a variety of food options ranging from fast food to proper meals, catering to different tastes and budgets. Seating can get crowded at times, but the overall vibe remains energetic.

Overall, Korum Mall is perfect for those who prefer a compact, easy-to-navigate mall with plenty of brands and entertainment options in one place.

text:
If I could I'd give negative stars. The store was in an absolute mess, staff was least bothered in organising the items according to the prices. It's a total trap because as shown in the pictures, the sale says under 499 but if you see the kurtis, it says Buy 2 @ XYZ price, what you wouldn't notice easily is the each at the bottom.
I bought 8 kurtis in total, 6 from the 2 @ 549 shelves and 2 from the 2 @ 449 only from the stack of kurtis all folded up, there was no chance of us picking up something left by other customers. Yet, after 2 hours of trying on the clothes and standing in the queue for the billing, we were not informed that one pair of the 8 kurtis we purchased may not qualify for the discount. As someone who has worked in retail myself, it is common knowledge to let customers know of this even if you assume they know of it. Despite all this, the person at the counter couldn't care less to let us know of the No refund policy and the items not matching the discount offered, he was more busy on selling the membership that gets us offers.
We left the store feeling robbed after knowing there is no way we could get a refund for the items we would have a problem with. What's the point of a shop if the state of the clothes, the store policy and the staff are no different than buying from the vendors at the station.

place_address: Shop No.1, Gopal Krishna Gokhale Marg, Dada Patil Wadi, Naupada, Thane West, Mumbai, Thane, Maharashtra 400602, India
text:
I have been purchasing from this store for the last 25years, and because of that long relationship, I trusted them completely. During Ganpati, I purchased a diya worth ₹1,800 from them. After using it, I noticed it had a leakage problem, so I took it back to the shop and requested a replacement. They told me they would keep the diya with them and check with the company regarding the issue. Since I trusted them, I agreed and did not even ask for a credit note.

After a few months, when I visited the shop again, I asked either for a refund or for the amount to be adjusted against my new purchase. To my surprise, they simply said they could not give me anything because I did not have a credit note, and they claimed they did not have the diya with them anymore.

This was very disappointing, especially after being a loyal customer for so many years. What mattered to me was the trust in the relationship, but unfortunately, their handling of this issue has made me feel that I can no longer trust them.

Apart from this, some of their sales staff are polite, but a few are extremely rude in the way they speak to customers.

Based on this experience, I feel it is better to shop elsewhere, even at Crawford Market, rather than deal with this kind of customer service.

If I could I'd give negative stars. The store was in an absolute mess, staff was least bothered in organising the items according to the prices. I bought 8 kurtis in total, 6 from the 2 @ 549 shelves and 2 from the 2 @ 449 only from the stack of kurtis all folded up, there was no chance of us picking up something left by other customers. Yet, after 2 hours of trying on the clothes and standing in the queue for the billing, we were not informed that one pair of the 8 kurtis we purchased may not qualify for the discount. As someone who has worked in retail myself, it is common knowledge to let customers know of this even if you assume they know of it. Despite all this, the person at the counter couldn't care less to let us know of the No refund policy and the items not matching the discount offered, he was more busy on selling the membership that gets us offers.
We left the store feeling robbed after knowing there is no way we could get a refund for the items we would have a problem with. What's the point of a shop if the state of the clothes, the store policy and the staff are no different than buying from the vendors at the station.

Very disappointing experience overall. Customers deserve better transparency, honesty, and support.

A Shopper's Paradise: Lifestyle Store at Oberoi Mall
Lifestyle Store, nestled within the vibrant Oberoi Mall, offers a curated shopping experience that caters to diverse tastes and preferences. This multi-brand retail destination brings together a wide range of fashion, beauty, and home products under one roof.
A Fashion Haven
For fashion enthusiasts, Lifestyle offers an extensive collection of apparel, footwear, and accessories for men, women, and children. From trendy casual wear to elegant formal attire, you'll find something to suit every occasion. The store's well-curated selection of international and domestic brands ensures that you stay ahead of the fashion curve.
Beauty and Wellness
The beauty section at Lifestyle is a haven for beauty aficionados. With a wide array of cosmetics, fragrances, and skincare products from renowned brands, you can indulge in self-care and pampering. The knowledgeable staff can help you choose the perfect products to enhance your natural beauty.
Home and Lifestyle
Elevate your living spaces with Lifestyle's home and lifestyle products. From stylish home decor items to functional kitchenware, you'll find everything you need to create a beautiful and comfortable home. The store also offers a range of gifts and accessories for special occasions.
A Seamless Shopping Experience
Lifestyle Store at Oberoi Mall is designed to provide a seamless and enjoyable shopping experience. The spacious layout, well-organized sections, and attentive staff make it easy to navigate and find what you're looking for. The store also offers convenient payment options and efficient customer service.
Whether you're a fashionista, a beauty enthusiast, or a home decor aficionado, Lifestyle Store at Oberoi Mall is the perfect place to indulge your shopping desires.

Oberoi Mall is a popular shopping destination located in Mumbai, India. It is known for housing various lifestyle stores, including fashion, accessories, electronics, home decor, and more.

Lifestyle stores generally offer a wide range of products catering to different aspects of everyday life. Here are some categories commonly found in lifestyle stores:

Fashion: Lifestyle stores often have sections dedicated to clothing, footwear, and accessories for men, women, and children. You can find a variety of apparel items such as dresses, shirts, jeans, ethnic wear, sportswear, shoes, handbags, jewelry, and more.

Beauty and Personal Care: These stores usually have a beauty section with cosmetics, skincare products, hair care items, fragrances, and personal grooming products.

Home and Decor: Lifestyle stores often feature a home section offering a range of items for home decor, kitchenware, bedding, bath accessories, furniture, and other household essentials.

Electronics and Gadgets: Some lifestyle stores may also have a section dedicated to electronics, where you can find mobile phones, laptops, tablets, audio equipment, and other electronic gadgets.

Gifts and Stationery: Many lifestyle stores include a gifting section where you can find a variety of items suitable for different occasions, such as greeting cards, stationery, novelty items, and small gift items.

text: The store in itself has a good collection but a pretty bad management. They sell their membership by deceit and do not provide the right information to customers. Once the bill was generated and I questioned about the same again, I was told it wasn’t their policies for it to be applied in the same bill since my membership isn’t activated. Well, it’s on them to provide customers with all the information instead of assuming their policies are known to the entire world. There is no way I’ll know about their policies unless they tell me. text:
I have been a Westside Korum Mall customer since it opened in Thane. While I enjoy shopping here am absolutely astounded by the callousness of the staff at the store (mind you there are plenty of them).
In the trial room the staff are busy chatting with each other and you have to keep asking for their attention.
I was shown some accessories at checkout which I selected last minute but realised that it wasn’t my size when I moved away from the counter. I saw the same in my size and made a request to change it…
Tried to return it but Chandani said that I can’t return it (this was only two minutes after my purchase). When i said it’s not my size she said I should read the BILL and to try on the size in front of her!
When I said i would complain she looked unbothered and unapologetic.
By the way the bill was received by me after I left the store!
Totally upset with the lack of customer service and complete disregard and disrespect..don’t expect this from a Tata company.

No courtesy, no apology just blatant disregard
Urgent training required and definitely an apology is in order!

text: Westside used to stand for superior customer service and an excellent brand. Sadly they have now reduced themselves to cheap tricks like cash grabbing and mis-selling and don't concern themselves regarding customer satisfaction. Earlier Westside had convinced me to avail their membership saying it was free of cost and we would get discount in the Birthday month. During the entire year when we did our purchases we did not get any discount for our membership and they said discount will be availed in Birthday month only. Now when my Birthday month came and we wanted to avail discount, we were told that the Membership had expired and we had to pay Rs. 200.00 to renew the Membership and to avail discount. So how does that make Membership free of cost? And what's the point of availing Membership I can't understand when we did not get any discount at all and have to pay extra money. text:
I recently visited the Dumroo store near Federal Bank, Mulund West. Before parking, we specifically confirmed with the staff if it was okay to park our car at a specific location. We even pointed out our car, and the staff clearly said, “Yes, no problem.”

After finishing our shopping and returning home, we were shocked to receive a ₹1500 parking challan. When we went back to the shop to discuss the issue, the staff continued to insist that parking is allowed there but refused to take any accountability or responsibility for the misleading information.
I’m sharing this so that other car owners are aware — please do not rely on the staff’s parking advice. Always double-check official parking signs or use public parking spaces to avoid unnecessary fines.
It’s disappointing that despite being honest customers, we had to bear this loss due to careless guidance.
They have definitely opened a big shop but no facility for customers who own car. And some staff has poor knowledge , no accountability, no moral values.

text:
I had a wonderful experience visiting Indriya Jewels. The store ambience is elegant and very welcoming, which instantly makes you feel comfortable. The jewellery collection is beautifully displayed, and the overall setup reflects quality and class.
Hiren Sir patiently showed us the jewellery and explained the designs in detail. Rupali also assisted us by showcasing different collections with great clarity and interest. Swati explained the billing process very smoothly, making it easy to understand. The staff handling the machinery and coordination were extremely polite and professional throughout.
Overall, the staff behavior, hospitality, pantry arrangement, and customer handling were excellent. It was a pleasant and memorable experience, and I would definitely recommend Indriya Jewels to others.

place_address: Shop No 1, Keshav Bhavan, MG Road, near Shiv Sena Office, Mulund West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400080, India
text:
They’ve got a lovely jewellery collection — elegant, wearable pieces with thoughtful designs.

What stood out was their smart schemes — honestly, some great benefits if you’re planning to buy. The staff was genuinely helpful, knew their stuff, and made the whole experience feel smooth and personal.

I had gone there as a speaker for sixth anniversary celebration and book launch by XtraOrdiNAARI, and everything — from the setup to the warmth — felt just right. It’s one of those places you’d want to come back to, whether you’re buying or just browsing.

Valet parking is available.

place_address: Shop No 1, Keshav Bhavan, MG Road, near Shiv Sena Office, Mulund West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400080, India
text:
Extremely disappointing experience at the Indriya Jewellery Store (Aditya Birla Group).
Today, during billing, I used my father’s card something that is completely normal in families where parents, spouses, or children often make purchases on behalf of one another. Despite clearly explaining that my father was travelling for business and that I would be entering the PIN myself, the staff refused to proceed with the transaction and insisted on calling the cardholder or obtaining “return consent.”
This was honestly shocking and unnecessarily humiliating as a customer. Nowhere was this policy displayed or communicated beforehand, and the way it was handled felt more like suspicion than customer service.
In real life, many people use family members’ cards parents for children, spouses for each other and treating customers as if they are doing something wrong for a common practice is unacceptable. If this is truly a policy, it should be transparently communicated and handled respectfully, not enforced in a rigid and embarrassing manner at the billing counter.
Luxury retail is not only about products but also about customer experience and today’s interaction was far from professional or welcoming.
Very disappointed with Indriya. Definitely not the experience one expects from a brand associated with the Aditya Birla Group

text:
Extremely disappointing experience at the Indriya Jewellery Store (Aditya Birla Group).
Today, during billing, I used my father’s card something that is completely normal in families where parents, spouses, or children often make purchases on behalf of one another. Despite clearly explaining that my father was travelling for business and that I would be entering the PIN myself, the staff refused to proceed with the transaction and insisted on calling the cardholder or obtaining “return consent.”
This was honestly shocking and unnecessarily humiliating as a customer. Nowhere was this policy displayed or communicated beforehand, and the way it was handled felt more like suspicion than customer service.
In real life, many people use family members’ cards parents for children, spouses for each other and treating customers as if they are doing something wrong for a common practice is unacceptable. If this is truly a policy, it should be transparently communicated and handled respectfully, not enforced in a rigid and embarrassing manner at the billing counter.
Luxury retail is not only about products but also about customer experience and today’s interaction was far from professional or welcoming.
Very disappointed with Indriya. Definitely not the experience one expects from a brand associated with the Aditya Birla Group

text:
Highly Recommended – Excellent Work by Greco Homes 🏡

This is the amazing wardrobe that Greco  has completed at my home in Hiranandani, Thane. It is a beautiful floor-to-ceiling single shutter design, giving a very premium and seamless look.

The entire base structure was factory-made, and they even showed me the fully assembled unit in the factory before installation. That gave me great confidence in their quality and finishing.

Installation at my home was completed smoothly within just 3 days, which is impressive.

I am especially happy with the eco-friendly material they used — it is 100% wood-free, waterproof, and termite-proof, which makes it a long-lasting and smart investment.

Overall, I am extremely satisfied with the product quality, finishing, and service.

I strongly recommend Greco to anyone looking for high-quality wardrobes.

Highly recommended Greco Homes.

"Disgusting behavior by security staff – completely unprofessional"
I visited Lifestyle Seawoods on 10th March at around 9:15 PM to make a purchase, and I was absolutely shocked by the rude and disrespectful behavior of the security guard at the entrance.
Instead of politely informing me about the store timing, he flat out refused to let me in and said "Subh se kya soya tha jo abhi aaya hai?"  which is not only extremely rude but also highly insulting to a customer who came with genuine intent to shop.
He further said "Hum kya pagal hain yahan khade rehne ko?" and told me to come tomorrow or not come at all. This is absolutely unacceptable. As a customer, I deserve basic respect and courtesy  not sarcasm and aggression from someone who is supposed to be welcoming people into the store.
Lifestyle is a reputed brand, and this kind of staff behavior completely destroys the customer experience. If your closing time is 9:15 PM, your staff should communicate that politely not humiliate paying customers.
I strongly urge the management to look into this incident and take strict action. No customer should ever be spoken to this way.

A Shopper's Paradise: Lifestyle Store at Oberoi Mall
Lifestyle Store, nestled within the vibrant Oberoi Mall, offers a curated shopping experience that caters to diverse tastes and preferences. This multi-brand retail destination brings together a wide range of fashion, beauty, and home products under one roof.
A Fashion Haven
For fashion enthusiasts, Lifestyle offers an extensive collection of apparel, footwear, and accessories for men, women, and children. From trendy casual wear to elegant formal attire, you'll find something to suit every occasion. The store's well-curated selection of international and domestic brands ensures that you stay ahead of the fashion curve.
Beauty and Wellness
The beauty section at Lifestyle is a haven for beauty aficionados. With a wide array of cosmetics, fragrances, and skincare products from renowned brands, you can indulge in self-care and pampering. The knowledgeable staff can help you choose the perfect products to enhance your natural beauty.
Home and Lifestyle
Elevate your living spaces with Lifestyle's home and lifestyle products. From stylish home decor items to functional kitchenware, you'll find everything you need to create a beautiful and comfortable home. The store also offers a range of gifts and accessories for special occasions.
A Seamless Shopping Experience
Lifestyle Store at Oberoi Mall is designed to provide a seamless and enjoyable shopping experience. The spacious layout, well-organized sections, and attentive staff make it easy to navigate and find what you're looking for. The store also offers convenient payment options and efficient customer service.
Whether you're a fashionista, a beauty enthusiast, or a home decor aficionado, Lifestyle Store at Oberoi Mall is the perfect place to indulge your shopping desires.

text: The store in itself has a good collection but a pretty bad management. They sell their membership by deceit and do not provide the right information to customers. I was asked to take membership and I repeatedly asked if the birthday month discounts would be applicable to the current bill. Once the bill was generated and I questioned about the same again, I was told it wasn’t their policies for it to be applied in the same bill since my membership isn’t activated. Again this was never told to me. When I asked to cancel the membership, I was told they can’t because the membership is activated. I heard so many contradictory comments. When I asked to see a manager, someone pretended to be one. I had to ask additional questions, and then was revealed that he was infact not the manager. The manager came in and kept explaining how it’s not in their policies and no one does it. Well, it’s on them to provide customers with all the information instead of assuming their policies are known to the entire world. There is no way I’ll know about their policies unless they tell me. In the end, I realized that not only are they wasting my money, they are continuing to waste my time. Please be careful and do not sign up for any membership offered by them!

text:
Nexus Seawoods is a massive, premium destination in Navi Mumbai, often considered the heart of the city's modern shopping and entertainment scene. Spanning over a million square feet, it seamlessly integrates with the Seawoods-Darave railway station, making it incredibly accessible. It’s widely recognized for its sleek, international-standard interiors and diverse offerings that cater to everyone from luxury shoppers to families looking for a day out.

Retail & Fashion: It houses a vast collection of international and domestic brands, including popular chain stores for fashion, electronics, and home decor, providing a one-stop-shop for all lifestyle needs.

Entertainment Hub: The mall features the Cinépolis - Nexus Seawoods Mall multiplex, offering state-of-the-art projection and sound for a top-tier movie-watching experience.

Dining Variety: From quick bites in a large food court to sophisticated dining at places like 24K Kraft Brewzz, Nexus Seawoods Mall, Navi Mumbai, the mall offers an extensive range of cuisines and restaurant styles.

Ambiance & Design: Visitors frequently mention the spacious, clean, and well-organized layout, which makes even peak-hour visits feel manageable and comfortable.

text:
Nexus Seawoods Mall is a large, well-maintained, and premium mall with a wide variety of stores, making it a complete shopping and hangout destination. The mall is very clean, spacious, and well organized, which makes walking around comfortable and enjoyable. Almost all major brands and outlets are available, so shopping options are excellent in every category.

The overall ambiance is modern and pleasant. Attractions like Snoworld add to the experience and make the mall enjoyable for families and kids as well. Food courts, seating areas, and common spaces are well managed, adding to the overall comfort. In terms of facilities, cleanliness, stores, and environment, it is one of the best malls in Navi Mumbai for sure.

However, the gaming zone is not that impressive. Most of the games feel generic and not very engaging, with only 2–3 games being genuinely good. Compared to Timezone at Inorbit Mall, the experience is quite limited and less exciting. It also feels more expensive than Timezone while offering less value.

Overall, Nexus Seawoods Mall is excellent in almost every aspect, especially shopping, cleanliness, and ambiance. Despite the average gaming zone, it remains a very good mall and a great place to spend time in Navi Mumbai.

place_address: 1, Seawoods Station Rd, Nerul East, Sector 40, Nerul, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 400706, India
text:
Visited Nexus Seawoods Mall with family and had an amazing experience. It's one of the biggest and best-maintained malls in Navi Mumbai. The entire place is well-organized, clean, and has a modern, premium feel. Whether you’re going for shopping, food, entertainment, or just to spend time with loved ones — this mall has everything under one roof.

We started with the food court, which is quite spacious and has a good variety of options. We tried McDonald’s, KFC, Burger King, and a few other stalls — all the food was fresh and served quickly despite the crowd. Seating was not an issue, and there were options for both light snacks and full meals. The atmosphere in the food court is lively but not too noisy, making it comfortable to sit and relax for a while.

After the food, we spent time exploring the shopping floors. Visited Pantaloons, Westside, and Lifelong, and we found great deals and variety. Lifelong had some home and kitchen essentials, while Westside and Pantaloons had good fashion options for the whole family. The staff in most stores were helpful and polite. The overall shopping experience was smooth, and billing counters were quick even during peak hours.

Apart from food and shopping, there’s also a huge entertainment section and INOX theatre, which we plan to check out next time. The mall also has several small kiosks, dessert counters, toy shops, and kids' gaming zones. Great place if you have kids with you.

Parking was hassle-free — they have a multi-level parking structure with clear signs. Entry and exit were smooth, and security at the entrance was also well-managed. There are lifts and escalators at all points, so it's convenient even for elderly people.

Overall, Nexus Seawoods Mall is a perfect destination for a weekend outing or even just an evening visit. From food and fashion to fun and comfort, everything was well balanced. Would definitely recommend visiting with family or friends — there’s something here for everyone.

text:
I recently experienced an issue with the parking management where I was charged twice for the same parking service.

At the time of parking, the staff informed me that the FASTag system was not working and asked me to make the payment separately. Since I was with my family and getting late, I paid the parking charges through UPI as requested. However, after returning home, I noticed that the parking amount had also been deducted from my FASTag account.

Additionally, upon reviewing the parking slip, I found that the vehicle number mentioned on the slip was incorrect and did not match my car’s registration number.

This appears to be an unfair and improper practice. I request the concerned authority to look into this matter and take appropriate action, as well as arrange for a refund of the wrongly deducted amount.

The biggest drawback is the parking. Honestly, it feels more like a bus stop than a proper mall parking facility — chaotic, poorly designed, and inconvenient. This really takes away from the overall experience.

If the management improves the parking and ground floor setup, Nexus Seawoods has the potential to be one of the best malls in Navi Mumbai.

I bought 8 kurtis in total, 6 from the 2 @ 549 shelves and 2 from the 2 @ 449 only from the stack of kurtis all folded up, there was no chance of us picking up something left by other customers. Yet, after 2 hours of trying on the clothes and standing in the queue for the billing, we were not informed that one pair of the 8 kurtis we purchased may not qualify for the discount. As someone who has worked in retail myself, it is common knowledge to let customers know of this even if you assume they know of it. Despite all this, the person at the counter couldn't care less to let us know of the No refund policy and the items not matching the discount offered, he was more busy on selling the membership that gets us offers.
We left the store feeling robbed after knowing there is no way we could get a refund for the items we would have a problem with. What's the point of a shop if the state of the clothes, the store policy and the staff are no different than buying from the vendors at the station.

text:
GIA India Laboratory Private Limited is widely recognized as one of the most trusted and authoritative diamond and gemstone grading laboratories in the country. As part of the globally respected Gemological Institute of America, the laboratory operates with the highest standards of accuracy, independence, and integrity, reinforcing confidence in diamonds and gemstones across the Indian and international markets.

One of the strongest qualities of GIA India Laboratory Private Limited is its unwavering commitment to scientific precision. Every diamond and gemstone is examined using advanced technology and strict grading methodologies that are consistent with global GIA standards. This ensures reliable, unbiased, and internationally accepted grading reports, which are highly valued by manufacturers, traders, retailers, and consumers alike.

The laboratory is known for its highly skilled team of gemologists and technicians who undergo rigorous training and continuous skill development. Their expertise, combined with standardized procedures, ensures consistency and transparency in every report issued. This professionalism plays a crucial role in maintaining trust and credibility throughout the gems and jewelry supply chain.

GIA India Laboratory Private Limited also stands out for its state-of-the-art facilities. Equipped with advanced instruments and modern testing systems, the laboratory is capable of handling high volumes while maintaining exceptional accuracy and quality control. Its efficient processes and adherence to strict timelines make it a reliable partner for businesses in the diamond and gemstone industry.

Another important strength of the laboratory is its ethical approach. GIA’s strict policies on independence and objectivity ensure that grading results are free from commercial influence. This ethical framework helps protect the integrity of the trade and supports fair practices across the industry.

Overall, GIA India Laboratory Private Limited represents excellence, trust, and global consistency in diamond and gemstone grading. Its scientific rigor, professional expertise, advanced infrastructure, and ethical standards make it a cornerstone of reliability in the Indian gems and jewelry industry.

place_address: Sai Jewel, Sai Jewel, Sector 35-I, Kutak Bandhan, Kharghar, Panvel, Maharashtra 410210, India
text:
Was an interesting experience, The track was well made and designed,  but I found it a bit small . And was told this is the largest one, so good. Took the champions package but wanted legendary go kart insted of advance as the difference is a few hundred, unfortunately that was not possible,  but they said they will be making an extra package . Hopefully next time that will be avaliable. The legendary Go-Karts are way better than the advance by a lot and makes sense to take them if a package is made.  I was give a few complimentary laps in the legendary and was very impressed by its performance and power. Still it could have a bit more kick lol. As for the other games they were fun but the radio car racing wasn't what i was expecting , It could have been done much better . It was the only area that I felt was Sadly lacking . And the helmets may require an update , I would suggest you get your own if you have one, As an all round experience it was excellent and totally worth while a visit any time as they are open 24hrs a day .

PS. The highway has no U Turn for like 5 Km Making one have to cross the track and travel 10 km up and down extra to reach. Crazy. Horrible trucks and terrible traffic on the way.
Even to get to the fountain head area while returning the same thing doubled . Almost 20 km to take a UTurn.

text:
Good karting experience, though it was my first time.

Staff was courteous as they guided us and encouraged us to take pictures and videos. If you are carrying mobile with you, take their permission, they will definitely allow.

Problems:
They just have one level 1 car. So all have only one choice, pay ~₹1200 for level 2 car for 7 minutes.

Felt like the tyres of car were patched, hence the car was wobbly and it wasn’t a smooth ride. This was true for both the cars we were on.

place_address: Sai Jewel, Sai Jewel, Sector 35-I, Kutak Bandhan, Kharghar, Panvel, Maharashtra 410210, India
text:
I went here with my friends around midnight (they’re open 24×7!) and we had an amazing experience. We chose the Level 2 electric karts which cost around ₹1200, but after taxes it came to about ₹1770 per person. They also have Level 3 karts, though only two are available.

The highlight of our visit was definitely the staff. The manager on duty (Swapnil, if I remember correctly) was incredibly polite, friendly, and super helpful. He even gave us a little extra time on the track since all three of us were driving well. That small gesture made the experience even better.

The karts themselves are smooth and fun to drive. As someone who has driven petrol karts before, I did notice a few minor differences in terms of power and steering stiffness — but honestly, these are very small things. For beginners or casual drivers, it’s absolutely perfect and a guaranteed thrill.

Overall, Republic of Karting Mumbai is a fantastic place to enjoy late-night adrenaline with friends. Great staff, well-maintained karts, and the fact that it’s open 24×7 just makes it unbeatable. Highly recommended! 🚦🏎️

place_name: Raghuleela Mall Vashi - The Wadhwa Group
place_address: 35, 38 Plot, 34, Pranavanandji Marg, Sector 30A, Vashi, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 400703, India
text: 🛍️ Detailed Note on Raghuleela Mall, Vashi, Mumbai ​Raghuleela Mall is a prominent four-storey, air-conditioned shopping and entertainment destination situated in Vashi, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. Developed by Raghuleela Properties Pvt. Ltd. and designed by architect Reza Kabul, the mall has been a significant commercial landmark in the area since its establishment, offering a mix of retail, dining, and leisure facilities. ​🏢 Architecture and Location ​The mall covers a substantial floor area, approximately 375,000 sq ft (34,800 m^2) on each of its four levels. Its design incorporates lifts, escalators, and a central staircase atrium for easy navigation. A key highlight of Raghuleela Mall is its strategic and highly accessible location in Sector 30A, Vashi, directly opposite the Vashi Railway Station and near the Sion Panvel Highway. This prime location ensures a steady daily footfall, which historically has reached up to 30,000 shoppers. The mall also provides parking facilities, capable of accommodating around 400 cars. Furthermore, the complex includes an attached IT Park known as Raghuleela Arcade. ​🛒 Retail and Anchor Tenants ​The mall traditionally housed a diverse range of local and international brands, catering to a wide consumer base. Historically, it featured major anchor tenants such as: ​Brand Factory (or Fashion Factory): A major clothing and apparel store. ​Footin ​INOX Multiplex: A significant six-screen cinema complex located on the third floor. ​Imperial Banquets: A large venue for events. ​In addition to the anchor stores, other well-known retail chains like Peter England, Woodlands, and Cambridge have been tenants. The retail mix has often been categorized as offering "value for money" shopping. However, current reports suggest a decline in the number of open shops and overall maintenance, with many spaces now vacant. ​🍽️ Dining and Entertainment ​A major draw for visitors is the entertainment and food options: ​INOX Multiplex: The six-screen cinema is one of the main attractions, providing a modern movie-watching experience with facilities like m-ticket, F&B, gaming zones, and recliner seats (in some screens). It remains a highly operational part of the mall. ​Food & Beverages: The mall features a food court, though its offerings have reportedly become more limited over time. Notable theme-based restaurants, such as Village, Umrao Jaan, and Coconut Grove (operated by KHPL), have been a part of the mall's dining landscape, offering unique culinary experiences. A branch of McDonald's on the ground floor is often cited as a key remaining quick-service option. ​uture Redevelopment ​A significant development to note is the announced plan for the mall's future. The Wadhwa Group has acquired the surrounding commercial space and plans to redevelop the Raghuleela Mall structure into a premium mixed-use commercial development. This new project is expected to incorporate modern retail spaces, offices, and residential areas. Subject to regulatory approvals and design finalization, the mall is reportedly expected to be demolished by late 2025 to make way for this ambitious redevelopment. This highlights a transition for what was once a pioneering and popular shopping center in Navi Mumbai. ​🕰️ Timings ​The general operating hours for Raghuleela Mall are typically from 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM daily, though specific store or cinema timings may vary. ​Raghuleela Mall, Vashi, therefore, stands at a crossroads—a landmark that has served as a retail and entertainment hub for years but is now poised for a complete transformation into a modern mixed-use complex.

Raghuleela Mall in Vashi has really gone downhill. It used to be a popular spot, but now it’s mostly empty with many shops closed. The mall is in poor shape, with broken ceilings, and the elevators, stairs, and AC are often out of order. The food court, which was once a highlight, has lost most of its options, leaving only a few places to eat.

The only things still worth visiting are McDonald's on the ground floor and the INOX cinema on the top floor. The mall’s glass design is still nice, but that’s pretty much all that stands out now. It used to be one of the best malls in a prime location, but now it feels neglected and far from the lively place it once was. If you’re going, it’s mainly for the cinema or a quick bite at McDonald's; otherwise, there’s not much left to see or do.

text:
Edit (Update):
As per recent news, Raghuleela Mall in Vashi is set to be demolished for a premium mixed-use redevelopment by the Wadhwa Group. Also, Metro on the ground floor has now closed too. This just confirms how rapidly the mall has declined. Hopefully, the new development will bring better use to this prime location near the railway station.

Old review
Raghuleela Mall isn't what it used to be. Most of the shops are closed now, making it feel really empty. The only store that's worth visiting is Fashion Factory, owned by Reliance. Besides that, you can go there for a movie at INOX or a bite at McDonald's.

On the ground floor, you'll find McDonald's, 7/11, and Metro (similar to D-Mart). The first floor has Fashion Factory and more salons. The second floor has INOX, but almost all the food stalls there are closed. Despite being very close to the railway station, no one is coming here. Honestly, the mall just isn't worth the trip anymore. I think Inorbit would be a better option to visit. I hope Raghuleela can get better in the future, but right now, it's pretty disappointing.

text:
Accessibility: A good mall should be easily accessible, with ample parking spaces and convenient public transportation options.

Variety of stores: A good mall should have a diverse range of stores, including popular brands and unique boutique stores, to cater to different tastes and preferences.

Cleanliness: A good mall should be well-maintained and clean, with a comfortable and inviting atmosphere.

Amenities: A good mall should offer various amenities, such as restrooms, food courts, entertainment areas, and play areas for children.

Customer service: A good mall should have friendly and helpful staff who can assist customers with their queries and concerns.

Based on these factors, a review of a mall could be:

"This mall is conveniently located, with ample parking and easy access to public transportation. The mall offers a diverse range of stores, from popular brands to unique boutique stores. The mall is well-maintained and clean, with a comfortable atmosphere. The amenities are plentiful, with various dining options, entertainment areas, and play areas for children. The staff are friendly and helpful, making the shopping experience pleasant and enjoyable. However, the mall could benefit from more seating areas and better lighting in certain sections."

Because of my positive experience, I’ve recommended Fitness Fuel 360 to many of my friends, and they’ve also had great feedback. When you can confidently refer your own circle to a shop, that says everything.

place_address: Rajkamal Shopping market, West, NL - 1 Type, Sector 10, Nerul, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 400706, India
text:
Rajkamal made my wedding shopping truly special. Their collection is absolutely stunning from elegant bridal outfits to beautifully crafted accessories, everything felt thoughtfully curated. The staff was warm, patient, and genuinely helpful, making sure I found exactly what i wanted .The fitting process was smooth, and they paid attention to every little detail so that everything looked perfect for my big day. I especially appreciated their honest suggestions and the way they understood my style and budget.
If you’re looking for a place that combines variety, quality, and great service, Rajkamal is the perfect choice. I left feeling confident, happy, and more excited than ever for my wedding day!

place_address: Rajkamal Shopping market, West, NL - 1 Type, Sector 10, Nerul, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 400706, India
text:
I couldn’t be happier with my experience working with this designer for my shaadi sherwani! From start to finish, the service was absolutely wonderful. The best part was that my sherwani was a one-of-a-kind piece—no need to worry about running into anyone else with the same outfit!

I was pleasantly surprised that I didn’t have to go for multiple trials. The fitting and design were spot on from the get-go, making the entire process stress-free.

If you’re looking for a custom-designed sherwani that’s unique and of the highest quality, I would highly recommend this designer!

text: Airspace at Seawoods Grand Central Mall offers a vibrant shopping and entertainment experience. The mall boasts a diverse range of retail outlets, from high-end brands to local favorites, catering to various preferences. place_address: Nerul East, Sector 30, Nerul, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 400706, India
text:
Nexus Seawoods Mall, located in Navi Mumbai, is a prominent shopping and entertainment destination. Spread over a vast area, it offers a wide range of retail, dining, and entertainment options, making it a favorite spot for locals and tourists alike. The mall is well-known for its modern architecture and spacious layout, providing a comfortable and enjoyable shopping experience.

With a diverse mix of national and international brands, Nexus Seawoods Mall caters to various tastes and preferences. From high-end fashion and accessories to electronics and home décor, the mall has something for everyone. Additionally, the food court and numerous standalone restaurants offer a variety of cuisines, from fast food to fine dining, ensuring visitors have plenty of options to satisfy their culinary cravings.

The mall's convenient location, adjacent to the Seawoods–Darave railway station, enhances its accessibility, making it an ideal destination for a day out. Whether for shopping, dining, or entertainment, Nexus Seawoods Mall offers a comprehensive and enjoyable experience, making it a key landmark in Navi Mumbai's retail landscape. Its blend of variety, convenience, and modern amenities make it a popular choice among shoppers and visitors.

text:
Very disappointing experience at the exchange counter. The staff behaved rudely and insisted that we bring a pass from security, which was not communicated in advance. Such requirements should be clearly mentioned on the bill or displayed at the desk.Additionally, after issuing the credit note, we were asked to go to a different counter for billing, which resulted in unnecessary waiting in the queue again.

Overall, the process was inefficient and poorly managed. I would strongly recommend improving your service workflow and providing proper communication training to the staff.

place_address: Shop 34, above Mahavir Vihar, Nerul East, Sector 40, Nerul, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 400706, India
text:
Westside - located on the first floor of nexus mall. It has a wide range of clothing for women, men and children along with accessories. The collection includes traditional, casual and formals. They renew their collections monthly.

The establishment is huge and one can get what one likes on looking extensively for their choice. It has all types of trending clothes for all ages. The trial rooms are spacious and 4 cabins for men and 4 for women.

The best time to visit is during the day as it is less crowded and it becomes easy to use the trial room else there are long queues for trial rooms as well as for billing counter.

The staff is cooperative and helpful. There are plenty billing counters to share the burden of long queues and hence the billing process gets faster.

During the birthday month, they give 20% discount above 5000 and under 20000 for their members. So plan accordingly.

All in all the shopping experience is great.

text: After watching countless positive videos on YouTube about Xiomi 17 Ultra, I made up my mind to shift away from iPhone solely for the Lica camera experience. I have been in the Apple ecosystem for 14 years. I was almost about to purchase this phone from Mi official website when I decided to get an experience of the UIUX and the feel of its operating system from an Mi store. But, to my disappointment, the sales advisor at the store wasn't friendly. He spoke in a very condescending and arrogant way to answer basic queries. I would have moved out of Apple ecosystem after being with it for almost 14 years if the demo would've been to my satisfaction. He could've answered  my questions with basic empathy, and detailed explaination. I was there roughly around 2:20PM to 2:45PM on the 17th of march 2026 and the store had just 1 or 2 other customers apart from me. However, he was least bothered to even look at me. When I asked how does the UIUX compare to that of an iPhone as last I used android was 14 years ago- to which he answered - "main kya bolu usme, use kare dekho tab samazega na". The entire experience made me compare the absolute professionalism at the Apple store versus that of Mi. I wondered if the sales is like this, the service support would be even more pathetic. I realised it wasn't worth spending 1.4lakhs on Mi. And so, just because of this sales advisor, I will remain a loyal to iPhone forever.

text:
After a frustrating experience with my Samsung S22 Ultra, which developed a green line issue and was met with disappointing customer service, I decided to sell it rather than pay for a screen replacement. I was on the hunt for a new phone that could match or surpass the Samsung's latest S25 Ultra in performance, camera quality, and overall user experience. My top contenders were the Vivo X200 Pro and the Xiaomi 15 Ultra.

I first checked out the Vivo X200 Pro at a Vivo store, and it felt great. But then I visited Xiaomi’s official store at Seawoods Central Mall, Nerul, Navi Mumbai, and wow—what a game-changer! The Xiaomi 15 Ultra felt incredible in hand, and when I compared its camera output side-by-side with the Vivo X200 Pro and the S25 Ultra at nearby stores, the Xiaomi blew me away with its sharper, more vibrant shots. I’d read some reviews mentioning heating issues with the Xiaomi 15 Ultra during prolonged camera use, but honestly, I noticed similar issues with the S25 Ultra, so it wasn’t a dealbreaker.

Battery life was a big concern for me, especially long-term battery health, and I was impressed to learn that the Xiaomi 15 Ultra has a dedicated chip for advanced battery management—definitely a plus. What sealed the deal, though, was the fantastic experience at the Xiaomi store. Mr. Sahil, the sales manager, and Mr. Taufiq, the store manager, were absolute gems. They patiently answered all my questions, shared detailed insights about the device, and even eased my worries about Xiaomi’s after-sales service. Their professionalism and warmth made the whole process a breeze.

In the end, I walked away with the Xiaomi 15 Ultra, and I couldn’t be happier with my decision. The device is phenomenal, and the store experience was top-notch. Big thanks to the Xiaomi team for making this such a smooth and satisfying purchase!

place_name: Westside - Army Navy Building, Fort, Mumbai
place_address: Army and Navy Building, Westside - A Unit of Trent Limited, 148, Mahatma Gandhi Road, Kala Ghoda, Fort, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400032, India
text:
Westside Fort – A Timeless Favourite

Westside at Fort has always held a special place in my heart. I have been visiting this particular store for the past 16 years and it continues to draw me in not just for its offerings but for the charm it exudes from the outside in.

What truly sets this Westside apart is the beautiful exterior architecture. Housed in a heritage style building its classic facade with arched windows and vintage detailing always catches my eye. There is a certain old world charm to it that makes it stand out from other Westside outlets in the city.

Inside the shopping experience is equally delightful. The women’s section has a lovely collection of Indian kurtas – stylish comfortable, versatile and affordable. Whether I am looking for something casual or festive, I always find something that suits my taste. The shoe section, too, is impressive with a good variety for both men and women.

The cherry on top is the Starbucks housed right within the building. After a satisfying round of shopping, it is the perfect spot to unwind with a coffee and soak in the Fort atmosphere.

Westside Fort is not just a store – it is a comforting familiar space that blends the charm of old Bombay with the convenience of modern retail. A true favourite over the years.

text:
Nappa Dori, Colaba: A Perfect Blend of Style and Service

My wife and I recently visited Nappa Dori in Colaba, and it was an absolute delight. Having shopped here last year, we returned this time to purchase a birthday gift for me: a beautifully crafted suitcase. The design is sleek, modern, and truly stands out in terms of style and quality — a perfect balance of aesthetics and function.

The store itself has a fantastic selection of luggage and stationery accessories, each piece reflecting the brand’s signature elegance and attention to detail. We both love everything about Nappa Dori — it’s become one of our favorite brands for its timeless appeal.

The customer service was exceptional. When I called later to ask how to set the suitcase code, the staff not only provided clear instructions but also remembered me and my order. This level of personal attention made the experience even more memorable.

While Nappa Dori also has a store in London, the Mumbai location, especially in Colaba, has a charm of its own. It’s definitely worth a visit for anyone looking for unique, high-quality accessories. Highly recommended!

text:
This is my second time coming to this particular Westside branch. The first time, they were nice as they desperately wanted to sell their membership card. During my second time here, the staff at the billing counter were quite rude. I wanted two separate bills, which for some reason, they initially refused. When I insisted, they grudgingly made two separate bills. I can understand, if it's a busy day and there's a lot of rush at the counter, but there was nobody waiting behind us. When they finally billed, they didn't even have the courtesy to put all the clothes in the carry bag. I waited initially and then did it myself, that too when traveling with an infant.

Just hate the fact that when they want to sell their membership card, they are nice to you (mind you, both times it was the same lady behind the counter). After that, they treat you like an inconvenience. Hope they train their staff better!

text: One of the well-known commercial hubs near CSMT with a mix of offices, travel agents, and small retail stores. The building has an old charm but is still maintained decently. The corridors are busy during office hours, but lifts are functional and staff in most shops are helpful. A good place for business-related visits, passport services, or online company offices.

place_address: shop no 148 1st floor, Ashoka Shopping Centre, Dhobi Talao, Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus Area, Fort, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400001, India
text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Ashoka Shopping Center is a very big building located just near Crawford Market. The name can be a little misleading because it is not a shopping mall or center. It is actually a commercial building with many offices and godowns. The ground floor has a few banks like HDFC and Kotak along with some doctors clinics including Dr Iqubal Bagasrawala who is a well known and respected cardiologist.

Parking is not available for visitors and is allowed only for the building members. Finding parking in this entire area is a real challenge and if the car is parked on the road chances are high that it will be towed away or the picture will be taken and a fine will be imposed.

Overall it is a well located and important commercial building with strong footfall and a wide variety of businesses operating inside.

place_address: New Era Mill Compound, Mogul Ln, Mahim United Industrial Estate, Matunga West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400016, India
text:
I am writing to express my concern about an issue I faced during my recent visit to your store (Kandivali East Thakur village).

On September 24th 2025 , I made a purchase of ₹7,556, which included groceries, clothing, and other items. On my recent visit to your store on 4th October, I returned with my wife to buy matching leggings for a kurta she had purchased earlier. While checking in, your staff tied my carry bag, as per your store policy.

However, when I exited the store, the security alarm went off, and it was discovered that a security tag had not been removed from one of the items I purchased on 24th September, 2025. This was clearly an oversight from your staff.

It is the responsibility of your staff to ensure that all security tags are properly removed at the time of billing. Their failure to do so caused this unnecessary inconvenience.

Additionally, the behavior of your security staff was disappointing. One female security staff member was particularly rude and unprofessional. Rather than handling the situation calmly, she blamed me for the issue, which was both frustrating and embarrassing. To make things worse, another staff member chose to argue with me instead of checking the security camera to verify the situation. This only delayed the process further and made it more uncomfortable.

The entire incident was time-consuming, unpleasant, and left me feeling disrespected as a customer.

Since the item was purchased by me and the bag was sealed by your staff, I believe I should not have been subjected to this kind of treatment. I request that you take appropriate action to ensure such incidents do not happen again, and that your team is trained to handle these situations more professionally and respectfully.

I look forward to your response and a resolution to this matter.

Thank you!

text:
Terrible Service: 45+ Minute Wait for a Simple Exchange!

My recent experience at Reliance Smart Bazaar was appalling, specifically regarding an exchange request. I was made to stand for over 45 minutes just to process a simple product exchange.This inexcusable delay was a direct result of staff negligence at the second enterance(near elevator) where I was not prompted for any baggage checks upon enterance with the product I wanted to exchange at the first place and at the cash counter the blame was pasted upon me for shoplifting (though had the proper receipts of the product I desired to exchange.)The employees handling the exchange process seemed disorganized, poorly trained, and completely unable to efficiently manage the task at hand. There was no sense of urgency or accountability, and multiple staff members seemed involved yet accomplished nothing for an extremely long period.
Waiting three-quarters of an hour for what should be a 5-minute transaction is unacceptable and shows a complete disregard for the customer's time. Reliance Smart Bazaar needs to urgently address the training and competency of their customer service and exchange desk staff. I should not have to waste nearly an hour of my day because your employees cannot perform basic tasks efficiently.
Extremely disappointed and unlikely to shop here again if this is the level of service one can expect. Avoid this store if you value your time.

text:
This place which opened a few months back is the largest store for groceries and other household products in Thakur Village Kandivali. It is in direct competition with the DMart store which has had a competition free run for the past 15 years or so in the absence of any other Super Market in Thakur Village.
The place is quite large and there are separate sections for different types of produce required for running a house.
In addition to the usual groceries therWe are sections for garments, kitchenware, vegetables and fruits, dairy products, fresh snacks & beverages.
One needs a few visits to get a handle on  the location in which different items are kept. The choice of brands for commonly used household groceries is definitely more than what is available in any other store, so one is spoilt for choices.
Also unique is the fact that staple groceries like foodgrains, pulses, sugar, vegetables, fruits etc are available in loose form which makes it convenient for people to buy the exact quantity by weight which the family requires.
Parking space in the basement and toilets add to a convenient shopping experience.
Will update with pictures shortly

text:
I had a very unpleasant experience while shopping at Smart Bazaar.

The staff behavior was highly unprofessional and careless. One of the casual workers was moving a trolley recklessly through the store without paying attention to customers around. What was most concerning was the complete lack of awareness and care for children in the store.

My child was almost hit by the trolley, and it could have resulted in a serious accident. Thankfully, I managed to pull my child away in time. Despite this, the staff member showed no concern, did not apologize, and continued behaving arrogantly.

Such negligence and attitude toward customer safety, especially involving children, is completely unacceptable. I strongly urge the management to take immediate action, ensure proper staff training, and enforce strict safety and behavioral standards inside the store.

This kind of experience significantly affects trust and willingness to visit again.

place_address: 2/2, Galaxy Supermarket, Sindhi Society, opp of Guru Kripa Hotel, Sion West, Sion, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400022, India
text:
I am writing to express my concern about an issue I faced during my recent visit to your store (Kandivali East Thakur village).

On September 24th 2025 , I made a purchase of ₹7,556, which included groceries, clothing, and other items. On my recent visit to your store on 4th October, I returned with my wife to buy matching leggings for a kurta she had purchased earlier. While checking in, your staff tied my carry bag, as per your store policy.

However, when I exited the store, the security alarm went off, and it was discovered that a security tag had not been removed from one of the items I purchased on 24th September, 2025. This was clearly an oversight from your staff.

It is the responsibility of your staff to ensure that all security tags are properly removed at the time of billing. Their failure to do so caused this unnecessary inconvenience.

Additionally, the behavior of your security staff was disappointing. One female security staff member was particularly rude and unprofessional. Rather than handling the situation calmly, she blamed me for the issue, which was both frustrating and embarrassing. To make things worse, another staff member chose to argue with me instead of checking the security camera to verify the situation. This only delayed the process further and made it more uncomfortable.

The entire incident was time-consuming, unpleasant, and left me feeling disrespected as a customer.

Since the item was purchased by me and the bag was sealed by your staff, I believe I should not have been subjected to this kind of treatment. I request that you take appropriate action to ensure such incidents do not happen again, and that your team is trained to handle these situations more professionally and respectfully.

I look forward to your response and a resolution to this matter.

Thank you!

place_address: 2/2, Galaxy Supermarket, Sindhi Society, opp of Guru Kripa Hotel, Sion West, Sion, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400022, India
text:
Terrible Service: 45+ Minute Wait for a Simple Exchange!

My recent experience at Reliance Smart Bazaar was appalling, specifically regarding an exchange request. I was made to stand for over 45 minutes just to process a simple product exchange.This inexcusable delay was a direct result of staff negligence at the second enterance(near elevator) where I was not prompted for any baggage checks upon enterance with the product I wanted to exchange at the first place and at the cash counter the blame was pasted upon me for shoplifting (though had the proper receipts of the product I desired to exchange.)The employees handling the exchange process seemed disorganized, poorly trained, and completely unable to efficiently manage the task at hand. There was no sense of urgency or accountability, and multiple staff members seemed involved yet accomplished nothing for an extremely long period.
Waiting three-quarters of an hour for what should be a 5-minute transaction is unacceptable and shows a complete disregard for the customer's time. Reliance Smart Bazaar needs to urgently address the training and competency of their customer service and exchange desk staff. I should not have to waste nearly an hour of my day because your employees cannot perform basic tasks efficiently.
Extremely disappointed and unlikely to shop here again if this is the level of service one can expect. Avoid this store if you value your time.

text:
This place which opened a few months back is the largest store for groceries and other household products in Thakur Village Kandivali. It is in direct competition with the DMart store which has had a competition free run for the past 15 years or so in the absence of any other Super Market in Thakur Village.
The place is quite large and there are separate sections for different types of produce required for running a house.
In addition to the usual groceries therWe are sections for garments, kitchenware, vegetables and fruits, dairy products, fresh snacks & beverages.
One needs a few visits to get a handle on  the location in which different items are kept. The choice of brands for commonly used household groceries is definitely more than what is available in any other store, so one is spoilt for choices.
Also unique is the fact that staple groceries like foodgrains, pulses, sugar, vegetables, fruits etc are available in loose form which makes it convenient for people to buy the exact quantity by weight which the family requires.
Parking space in the basement and toilets add to a convenient shopping experience.
Will update with pictures shortly

When I contacted the store, they asked for photos, but after I sent them, they blocked my number on WhatsApp and call instead of resolving the issue and claimed this had never happened before. So despite proof customer has to keep damage product and bear loss and face this unprofessional attitude. This is how they treat customers when there is a genuine complaint.

The staff also behave as if they are the only store around, can be quite rude, and are not customer-friendly. They often keep pushing unnecessarily expensive products, which I have personally observed multiple times.

Very unprofessional and disappointing. I have completely lost trust in this store and would not recommend buying from here.

place_address: Ground Floor, Jio World Drive, MAKER MAXITY, Bandra Kurla Complex Rd, West, Bandra East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400051, India
text:
Freshpik at Jio World Drive, BKC is more than a grocery store — it’s an experiential gourmet food superstore that brings together luxury, convenience, and discovery under one roof.  ￼

🛒 Specialties & Ambience
•	The store is designed to be immersive, blending digital and physical elements, theatrical product displays, and intuitive shopping experiences.  ￼
•	It features kiosks and themed zones — for instance, Cadbury Purple Room (3D chocolate printing), M&M’s Paradise (customize your mixes), and a Wine Library / tasting room for global wine selections.  ￼
•	For cheese lovers, there’s a House of Cheese counter with ~27 types including Brie, Gouda, Danish Blue, Cream Cheese, etc.  ￼
•	The Coffee Studio section caters to coffee aficionados with specialty brews.  ￼
•	Other zones include Tea Garden, ice teas, shakes, Epigamia yogurt bar, fresh salads and counter-made sandwiches.  ￼

📦 Brands & Product Range
•	Freshpik carries both local & international gourmet / premium labels, especially in chocolates, wines, and luxury confectionery.  ￼
•	You’ll find Godiva, Smoor, Cadbury among chocolate / confectionery brands.  ￼
•	Their grocery range covers exotic & organic fruits & vegetables, staples and ingredients for international cuisines (Italian, Korean, Japanese, Thai), healthy / gluten-/sugar-free lines, cold-press oils, dry fruits & nuts, natural & personal care products.  ￼
•	They also stock kitchen accessories, serveware, and gifting options.  ￼

🍃 What Makes It Stand Out
•	The blend of luxury, convenience & entertainment — it’s not just shopping, it’s an experience.  ￼
•	Strong focus on discovery — zones you might not see in a regular supermarket.  ￼
•	Good for foodies, gift shoppers, and people who like premium & imported goods.
•	It’s Reliance’s first foray into ultra-premium grocery, and currently their flagship location.

place_address: Ground Floor, Jio World Drive, MAKER MAXITY, Bandra Kurla Complex Rd, West, Bandra East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400051, India
text:
A Luxurious Grocery Experience with a Few Missteps: Freshpik Review

I recently had the opportunity to visit Freshpik, a high-end grocery supermarket located in Jio World Drive. As a foodie, I was excited to explore the aisles and discover some unique and exotic ingredients. Overall, I was impressed with the selection and quality of products, but there were a few missteps that prevented me from giving it a perfect score.

High-End Imported Goods Galore

Freshpik truly lives up to its promise of offering a wide range of high-end imported goods. From artisanal cheeses to gourmet chocolates, the selection is impressive and caters to a discerning crowd. I was particularly excited to find some hard-to-find ingredients, such as truffle oil and infused vinegars.

Well-Organized and Clean Store

The store itself is well-organized and clean, making it easy to navigate and find what you're looking for. The staff is friendly and helpful, although I did find that they could benefit from a bit more product knowledge.

The Cadbury Shake: A Disappointment

Unfortunately, my experience was marred by a lackluster Cadbury shake. I was excited to try this indulgent treat, but it fell flat. The shake was too thin and lacked the rich, creamy texture I've come to expect from a high-end grocery store.

Verdict

Despite the disappointing Cadbury shake, I would still highly recommend Freshpik to anyone looking for a luxurious grocery experience. The selection of high-end imported goods is impressive, and the store itself is well-organized and clean.
